Example: +{country} ({city}) {phone} JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"update.replacement_phones_group", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "user_id":"number", "id":"number", "name": "string", "site_ids": [ "number" ], "phone_selectors":[ { "element_attribute": "enum", "element_attribute_value": "string", "phone_number_template": "string", "phone_number_mask": "string" } ] } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "data": {}, "metadata": "object" } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the verb get"
docs.title: Editing groups of phone numbers to replace with call tracking numbers

docs.text: Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" id number yes Unique identifier of the group of elements to be replaced name string Group name. The name tells you which number the group is responsible for. For example, you can specify the name of the department: sales department or technical department. support site_ids array Unique identifiers of sites that own groups of site elements to be replaced with call tracking numbers Array of site page element selectors, automatically selected call tracking numbers phone_selectors array Within the context of one site (and group) there should not be selectors with the same element_attribute and element_attribute_value pairs Array of site page element selectors, automatically selected call tracking numbers element_attribute enum yes id class name selector number Attribute of the replaced element on the site page id - Identifier; class - Class; name - Title; selector - Selector; number - Number on the site. element_attribute_value string yes Name, value of the replaced element on the site page phone_number_template string no Number format. Choose how the phone number will be displayed in the {phone} tag. The digits of the number are indicated by the # symbol; there can be from 5 to 7. If your number has a different number of digits, they will remain at the beginning of the mask. For example, if the mask ###-##-## is selected, the number with extra characters 1234567 will be displayed as 123-45-67. A number with missing digits 12345 will be displayed as 1-23-45. phone_number_mask string no Phone mask. The rule for displaying call tracking numbers on the website. Choose from existing templates or customize your own by using tags or adding any text. Tag values: {country} - country code, {city} - city code, {phone} - phone number. Example: +{country} ({city}) {phone}

docs.text: Advertising campaigns > Creating an advertising campaign Method create.campaigns Description Creating an advertising campaign. You can only create an advertising campaign with the 'basic' type. Available to Agent, Client The available number of advertising campaigns is regulated at the tariff plan level Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the client agent on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" name string yes Advertising campaign name description string no Maximum 255 characters Advertising campaign description status enum no active inactive Advertising campaign status site_id number yes Unique site identifier campaign_conditions object no Advertising campaign conditions. Settings for linking a number to a block on the site site_blocks array no Settings for linking a number to a block on the website If site number blocks are not specified, then they are not configured, i.e. are considered not configured If site_blocks is specified at the same time as status = inactive , then the error `invalid_parameters_combination` will be returned site_block_id number yes Unique number block identifier phone_number_id number yes Unique identifier of the virtual number. To get a list of available virtual numbers you must use the get.campaign_available_phone_numbers method If id is specified and is not returned by get.campaign_available_phone_numbers , then an error with the mnemonic "entity_not_found" will be returned. A number with type = call_tracking can only be used in one advertising campaign. If the number is already used in another advertising campaign, the error `already_in_use` will be returned redirection_phone_number_id number no Unique identifier of the forwarding number. The forwarding number is only used if the phone_number_id parameter is of type `call_tracking`. The list of available numbers can be obtained using the get.campaign_available_redirection_phone_numbers method. Required if the phone_number_id parameter specifies a virtual number with the "call_tracking" type. If this is not the case, an error with the mnemonic "required_parameter_missed" will be returned. If the parameter is specified and a virtual number with type "va" is specified in phone_number_id , then the error `invalid_parameters_combination` will be returned The parameter can only contain redirection numbers, which are returned by the get.campaign_available_redirection_phone_numbers method. If this is not the case, then an error will be returned with the mnemonic "invalid_parameter_value" Available if the "va" component is connected. If the parameter is filled in and you do not have the "va" component, an error will be returned with the mnemonic "parameter_component_disabled" dynamic_call_tracking_enabled boolean no true, false Activation of dynamic call tracking. Only free numbers without the “Use in VATS” flag can be connected to the dynamic call tracking pool in the same code as the default ad campaign block number. If the required number of numbers is not available, they will be automatically purchased. Calls to numbers from the dynamic call tracking pool will be processed according to the rules for processing calls to the number of the advertising campaign block by default. Can be "true" if the parameter is phone_number_id = va | call_tracking . If this is not the case, an error will be returned with the mnemonic "invalid_parameters_combination" If you use this parameter, but you do not have the "dynamic_call_tracking" component connected, then you will be returned error with mnemonic "parameter_component_disabled" If status = inactive is specified at the same time, the error `invalid_parameters_combination` will be returned If the dynamic_call_tracking_enabled parameter has the value "true", then the dynamic_call_tracking parameter is required. The error "invalid_parameters_combination" will be returned. Dynamic call tracking dynamic_call_tracking object no Setting up dynamic call tracking. Required if the dynamic_call_tracking_enabled parameter for at least one block has the value "true", otherwise an error will be returned with the mnemonic "invalid_parameters_combination" If you use this parameter, but you do not have the "dynamic_call_tracking" component connected, then you will be returned error with mnemonic "parameter_component_disabled" reservation_time enum no 5m 10m 15m 20m 30m 1h 2h 4h 8h 1d 1w The default value is "15m". The period for which the number is assigned to the site visitor. After the specified time has passed, the number is assigned to the new visitor (or remains with the current one if call tracking numbers are available). count_virtual_numbers number yes minimum value 1 The number of numbers required for dynamic call tracking to work in one block. The specified number of numbers will be purchased. count_visits number yes minimum value 1 Number of visits per advertising campaign per day Condition group settings group_conditions array yes Maximum number of groups 30 Advertising campaign conditions group Condition settings conditions array yes Maximum number of conditions for a group is 50 Advertising campaign conditions in the conditions group type enum yes include exclude Advertising campaign conditions in the conditions group include - includes exclude - excludes campaign_parameter enum yes For a list of valid values and possible operators, see the table "List of parameters and their operators" value string yes Meaning. For some campaign_parameter there may be a list of valid values, see table "List of parameters and their operators" operator enum yes =, sub, ~ The operator is in condition. Depends on the parameter used campaign_parameter see table "List of parameters and their operators" "=" - matches exactly "sub" - includes "~" - regular expression Response parameters Title Type Required Description id number yes Unique identifier of the advertising campaign JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "create.campaigns", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "description": "string", "name": "string", "status": "enum", "site_id": "number", "site_blocks": [ { "site_block_id": "number", "phone_number_id": "number", "redirection_phone_number_id": "number", "dynamic_call_tracking_enabled": "boolean" } ], "dynamic_call_tracking": { "reservation_time": "enum", "count_virtual_numbers": "number", "count_visits": "number" }, "campaign_conditions": { "group_conditions": [ { "conditions": [ { "type": "enum", "campaign_parameter": "enum", "operator": "enum", "value": "string" } ] } ] } } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "data": { "id": "number" }, "metadata": { } } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the create verb"

docs.text: Advertising campaigns > Obtaining weights of advertising campaign parameters Getting weights for advertising campaign parameters Method get.campaign_parameter_weights Description Obtaining weights of advertising campaign parameters. A weighting system is needed to determine which advertising campaign to match with a visit. If, when you go to a site, one visit corresponds to several advertising campaigns, the system will assign an advertising campaign containing the condition whose value on the weight scale is the highest. Available to Agent, Client Request parameters Title Type Required Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the "get.customer_user" method limit number no Number of records returned. See section "Paging" offset number no Shift determines from which record number to return "limit" records. Default is "0". See section "Paging" filter object no See section "Filtering criteria" fields array no See section "View of returned data" sort array no See section "Sorting data" Response parameters Name Type Valid values Filtering Sorting Description site_id number yes yes Unique site identifier site_domain_name string yes Site address on the Internet. Without specifying the protocol - "http://" or "https://" entrance_page number from 0 to 100 The default value is "10". Login page referrer_domain number from 0 to 100 The default value is "20". Referrer domain search_engine number from 0 to 100 The default value is "20". Search engine search_query number from 0 to 100 The default value is "40". Search query engine number from 0 to 100 The default value is "25". Advertising system referrer number from 0 to 100 The default value is "30". docs.text: Advertising campaigns > Updating the weights of advertising campaign parameters Method update.campaign_parameter_weights Description Updating the weights of advertising campaign parameters. A weighting system is needed to determine which advertising campaign to match with a visit. If, when you go to a site, one visit corresponds to several advertising campaigns, the system will assign an advertising campaign containing the condition whose value on the weight scale is the highest. Available to Agent, Client Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" site_id number yes Unique site identifier entrance_page number no from 0 to 100 Login page referrer_domain number no from 0 to 100 Referrer domain search_engine number no from 0 to 100 Search engine search_query number no from 0 to 100 Search query engine number no from 0 to 100 Advertising system referrer number no from 0 to 100 Referrer channel number no from 0 to 100 Channel location number no from 0 to 100 Weight value for the parameters city, region, country utm_tags number no from 0 to 100 Weight value for parameters utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, utm_term, utm_content os_tags number no from 0 to 100 Weight value for parameters openstat_service, openstat_campaign, openstat_source, openstat_ad other_tags number no from 0 to 100 Weight value for parameters ef_id, yclid, gclid, ymclid JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "update.campaign_parameter_weights", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "site_id": "number", "other_tags": "number", "search_query": "number", "ad_engine": "number", "referrer": "number", "channel": "number", "entrance_page": "number", "location": "number", "utm_tags": "number", "os_tags": "number", "referrer_domain": "number", "search_engine": "number" } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "data": { }, "metadata": { } } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the update verb"

docs.text: Advertising campaigns > Editing an advertising campaign Method update.campaigns Description Editing an advertising campaign. Only advertising campaigns with the 'basic' type can be edited. Available to Agent, Client Partial update is possible. If a data array is updated, the transferred array will completely replace the existing one. For system advertising campaigns (with id = -1 ) and integrated campaigns, you can only edit the fields site_blocks and dynamic_call_tracking Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the client agent on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" id number yes Unique identifier of the advertising campaign name string no Advertising campaign name description string no Maximum 255 characters Advertising campaign description status enum no active inactive Advertising campaign status If an advertising campaign with configured blocks is switched to the "inactive" status, then all block settings are reset. site_id number yes Unique site identifier It is not possible to update site_id for an existing advertising campaign. campaign_conditions object no Advertising campaign conditions. Settings for linking a number to a block on the site site_blocks array no Settings for linking a number to a block on the website If there is no configured block in the list, then if the advertising campaign is updated, its settings will be reset If the advertising campaign is disabled ( status = inactive ), then this parameter cannot be changed. The error `invalid_parameters_combination` will be returned site_block_id number yes Unique number block identifier phone_number_id number yes Unique identifier of the virtual number. To get a list of available virtual numbers you must use the get.campaign_available_phone_numbers method If id is specified which is not returned by the get.campaign_available_phone_numbers method, then an error with the mnemonic "entity_not_found" will be returned. A number with type = call_tracking can only be used in one advertising campaign. If the number is already used in another advertising campaign, the error `already_in_use` will be returned redirection_phone_number_id number no Unique identifier of the forwarding number. The forwarding number is only used if the phone_number_id parameter is of type `call_tracking`. The list of available numbers can be obtained using the get.campaign_available_redirection_phone_numbers method. Required if the phone_number_id parameter specifies a virtual number with the "call_tracking" type. If this is not the case, an error with the mnemonic "required_parameter_missed" will be returned. If the parameter is specified and a virtual number with type "va" is specified in phone_number_id , then the error `invalid_parameters_combination` will be returned The parameter can only contain redirection numbers, which are returned by the get.campaign_available_redirection_phone_numbers method. If this is not the case, then an error will be returned with the mnemonic "invalid_parameter_value" Available if the "va" component is connected. If the parameter is filled in and you do not have the "va" component, an error will be returned with the mnemonic "parameter_component_disabled" dynamic_call_tracking_enabled boolean no true, false Activation of dynamic call tracking. Only free numbers without the “Use in VATS” flag can be connected to the dynamic call tracking pool in the same code as the default ad campaign block number. If the required number of numbers is not available, they will be automatically purchased. Calls to numbers from the dynamic call tracking pool will be processed according to the rules for processing calls to the number of the advertising campaign block by default. Can be "true" if the parameter is phone_number_id = va | call_tracking . If this is not the case, an error will be returned with the mnemonic "invalid_parameters_combination" If you use this parameter, but you do not have the "dynamic_call_tracking" component connected, then you will be returnederror with mnemonic "parameter_component_disabled" If status = inactive is specified at the same time, the error `invalid_parameters_combination` will be returned If the dynamic_call_tracking_enabled parameter is set to "true", then the dynamic_call_tracking parameter is required. The error "invalid_parameters_combination" will be returned. cost_ratio number minimum value 1 Coefficient that affects the value of the parameter `costs` cost_ratio_operator enum wo_changes multiply divide Operator that is used when calculating `costs` taking into account `cost_ratio` Dynamic call tracking dynamic_call_tracking object no Setting up dynamic call tracking. Required if the dynamic_call_tracking_enabled parameter for at least one block has the value "true", otherwise an error will be returned with the mnemonic "invalid_parameters_combination" If you use this parameter, but you do not have the "dynamic_call_tracking" component connected, then you will be returned error with mnemonic "parameter_component_disabled" reservation_time enum no 5m 10m 15m 20m 30m 1h 2h 4h 8h 1d 1w The period for which the number is assigned to the site visitor. After the specified time has passed, the number is assigned to the new visitor (or remains with the current one if call tracking numbers are available). count_virtual_numbers number yes minimum value 1 The number of numbers required for dynamic call tracking to work in one block. The specified number of numbers will be purchased. count_visits number yes minimum value 1 Number of visits per advertising campaign per day Condition group settings group_conditions array yes Maximum number of groups 30 Advertising campaign conditions group Condition settings conditions array yes Maximum number of conditions for a group is 50 Advertising campaign conditions in the conditions group type enum yes include exclude Advertising campaign conditions in the conditions group include - includes exclude - excludes campaign_parameter enum yes For a list of valid values and possible operators, see the table "List of parameters and their operators" value string yes Meaning. For some campaign_parameter there may be a list of valid values, see the table "List of parameters and their operators" operator enum yes =, sub, ~ The operator is in condition. Depends on the parameter used campaign_parameter see table "List of parameters and their operators" "=" - matches exactly "sub" - includes "~" - regular expression JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "update.campaigns", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "description": "string", "name": "string", "status": "enum", "cost_ratio": "number", "cost_ratio_operator": "enum", "id": "number", "site_id": "number", "site_blocks": [ { "site_block_id": "number", "phone_number_id": "number", "redirection_phone_number_id": "number", "dynamic_call_tracking_enabled": "boolean" } ], "dynamic_call_tracking": { "reservation_time": "enum", "count_virtual_numbers": "number", "count_visits": "number" }, "campaign_conditions": { "group_conditions": [ { "conditions": [ { "type": "enum", "campaign_parameter": "enum", "operator": "enum", "value": "string" } ] } ] } } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "data": { }, "metadata": { } } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the update verb"

The error `invalid_parameters_combination` will be returned site_block_id number yes Unique number block identifier phone_number_id number yes Unique identifier of the virtual number. A number with type = call_tracking can only be used in one advertising campaign. If the number is already used in another advertising campaign, the error `already_in_use` will be returned redirection_phone_number_id number no Unique identifier of the forwarding number. The forwarding number is only used if the phone_number_id parameter is of type `call_tracking`. The list of available numbers can be obtained using the get.campaign_available_redirection_phone_numbers method. docs.text: Loading communications > Getting call loading information Method get.uploaded_calls Description Getting Call Loading Information Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 points Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" limit number no Number of records to return. See "Paging Output" offset number no Shift, determines from which record number to return `"limit"` records. Default is "0". See "Paging Output" report_id number yes User report unique identifier. To get a list of user reports, you must use the "get.reports_list" method date_from iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Start date of the main selection by upload_time date_till iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss End date of the main selection by upload_time fields array no List of custom column identifiers, separated by comma. For the available list of columns, see "Getting Column Nesting" . The order affects the answer. Filters used in the report filter object no It is permissible to use no more than 2 уровней nesting. See examples below Filters applied in the report. The construction logic is similar to "Filtering criteria" filters array yes An expression can contain both simple filters and a filter tree. For an available list of filters for a report with their possible values, see section "Getting a list of possible filtering conditions for a report" . field string Field of the entity to which filtering will be applied (the list is predefined for the method) operator enum Filtering operator. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section "Filtering operators" value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. Sorting used in the report sort array no The sorting used in the report. The construction logic is similar to "Data sorting" Response parameters Name Type Valid values Filtering Sorting Default response Description ext_id string yes yes yes A unique call identifier in your system. ext_request_id string yes yes yes The unique identifier of the API request in which the calls were loaded. upload_time iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss no no no Date and time of downloading calls direction enum in - incoming call out - outgoing call yes yes yes Call direction calling_phone_number string E164 yes yes yes Caller number called_phone_number string E164 yes yes yes The number you called start_time iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss yes yes yes Date and time when the call session started finish_time iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss yes yes yes Call session end time is_lost boolean yes yes yes Sign that the call is lost or successful is_transfer boolean yes yes yes Indicator of whether there was a transfer during the call session. wait_duration number yes yes yes The length of time a subscriber waits before the first conversation with an employee. Value in seconds. talk_duration number yes yes yes The length of time a subscriber waits before the first conversation with an employee. Value in seconds. visitor_session_id number yes yes yes Unique visitor session identifier. campaign_id number yes yes yes Unique identifier of the advertising campaign. source_id number yes yes yes Unique identifier of the source. site_id number yes yes yes Unique site identifier. comment string yes yes yes Comment for the call. record_type enum wav mp3 yes yes yes Conversation file type status enum new - New call in_process - Call during loading cancelled - Call loading cancelled processed - The call is fully processed and the conversation is loaded error - An error occurred while loading the call yes yes yes Call loading status. error_code enum internal_error - Internal error download_error - Unknown error during file upload connection_download_error - Error connecting to the server. Network problem. http_status_download_error - The server from which we are downloading the file did not respond with 200. http_content_type_download_error - Content-Type does not meet the specification. max_file_size_download_error - The maximum file size has been exceeded. Currently - 50 MB. timeout_download_error - It took a very long time to download the file or it took a very long time to connect to the server. The maximum time is 30 seconds. decode_error - Could not open the conversation file, the first bytes are missing in the mp3 - ID3 and wav - RIFF files, or an error occurred during the decoding process. processing_error - An unknown error occurred while processing the conversation file. wav_min_duration_processing_error - The downloaded wav file is shorter than 16 seconds. wav_channels_processing_error - The downloaded wav file does not contain 2 channels. yes yes yes Error loading call. call_session_id number yes yes yes Unique call identifier, only for calls in the processed status. Notification about call processing callback object no no no Notification about call processing. url string no no no http/https address to which notification of successful call processing will be sent. events array processed - docs.text: Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" limit number no Number of records to return. See "Paging Output" offset number no Shift, determines from which record number to return `"limit"` records. Default is "0". See "Paging Output" report_id number yes User report unique identifier. To get a list of user reports, you must use the "get.reports_list" method date_from iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Start date of the main selection by upload_time date_till iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss End date of the main selection by upload_time fields array no List of custom column identifiers, separated by comma. For the available list of columns, see "Getting Column Nesting" . The order affects the answer. Filters used in the report filter object no It is permissible to use no more than 2 уровней nesting. See examples below Filters applied in the report. The construction logic is similar to "Filtering criteria" filters array yes An expression can contain both simple filters and a filter tree. For an available list of filters for a report with their possible values, see section "Getting a list of possible filtering conditions for a report" . field string Field of the entity to which filtering will be applied (the list is predefined for the method) operator enum Filtering operator. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section "Filtering operators" value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. Sorting used in the report sort array no The sorting used in the report. The construction logic is similar to "Data sorting"

docs.text:
Loading communications > Loading communications Parameter Meaning Necessary components for working with the method "Data API for configuration", "Loading calls from an external system" Necessary components for working with conversation files in wav format "Speech call analytics" Method weight 5 points Maximum number of calls in one request 50 pcs Maximum JSON size 512 KB IP address of the server that needs to be given access to download files 195.211.122.249 Method upload.calls Description Loading calls and conversations for speech or end-to-end analytics Available to Agent, Client Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the "get.customer_users" method calls array yes Call list. Maximum 50 ext_id string yes A unique call identifier in your system. If the system already has a successfully downloaded call or there are already 3 attempts to erroneously download a call with a given ext_id, then this call will be ignored. direction enum no in - incoming call out - outgoing call Call direction Default value 'in' calling_phone_number string yes E164. If direction = in could be "" Caller number called_phone_number string yes E164. If direction = out can be "" The number you called start_time iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Date and time of the start of the call session finish_time iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss End time of the call session. Cannot be less than start_time is_lost boolean yes Sign that the call is lost or successful is_transfer boolean no The default value is `false`. Indicator whether there was a transfer during the call session The conversation order of employees is determined in the parameters wav_records and mp3_records wait_duration number no The length of time a subscriber waits before the first conversation with an employee. Value in seconds. talk_duration number no The duration of the conversation is from the moment of the first conversation between the subscriber and the employee until the end of the conversation with the last employee. Value in seconds visitor_session_id number no Unique identifier of the visitor session received from CallGear. The parameter is needed if analytics of advertising campaigns is required. campaign_id number no A unique identifier for an advertising campaign in CallGear. The parameter is ignored if visitor_session_id is filled source_id number no Unique source identifier. It is possible to transfer only a non-remote source in the context of the client. If visitor_session_id is passed, then we will determine source_id using the session parameters. site_id number no Unique site identifier in CallGear The parameter is ignored if visitor_session_id or called_phone_number is filled in belongs to another site. comment string no Comment on the call. You can specify the name of the service or form that generated the call. Notification about call processing callback object no Notification about call processing JSON notification format url string yes http/https address to which notification of successful call processing will be sent. events array yes processed - the transferred call was processed successfully in_process - call in progress error - call processing error What notifications to receive about call processing Call tags tags array no Call tags tag_id number no Unique tag identifier in the CallGear system tag_name string yes Tag name. We look for a tag in our system by name, if we don’t find it, then we create it and set it to ring. If found, then we put the found tag on the call. Search is case sensitive. To place the "Sale" tag, you must use the method "set.tag_sales" Ignored if tag_id is filled in Conversation files for speech analytics wav_records array no Conversation files for speech analytics It is possible to transmit only if the “Speech Call Analytics” component is connected. MP3 recordings are automatically created from wav files for listening in your personal account employee_id number no Unique employee identifier in the CallGear system employee_name string yes Employee name (full name) We look for an employee by name (full name) in our system, if not found, then create and associate it with the call. If found, we associate it with the call. The search is not case sensitive. Ignored if employee_id is filled employee_channel enum yes left - left channel right - right channel Indicates which channel the employee is in Values only left or right record_url string yes Address where you can download the conversation file. We expect only https. Conversation files for listening in your personal account mp3_records array no Conversation files for listening in your personal account. Transmitting is prohibited if the wav_records parameter is filled employee_name string no Employee name (full name) We are looking for an employee by name (full name) in our system, if not found, then create and associate it with the call. If found, we associate it with the call. The search is not case sensitive. Ignored if employee_id is filled employee_id number no Unique employee identifier in the CallGear system record_url string yes Address where you can download the conversation file Response parameters Name Type Required Description Processing status notification options Name Type Required Valid values Description status enum yes processed - processed in_process - in the process of processing error - processing error Loaded call processing status ext_id string yes Unique call identifier in your system call_session_id number no Unique identifier for a call session in CallGear (see get.calls_report method) timestamp number yes Event creation time in UTC GMT+00:00 error_message string no Error message. Filled in if the status parameter is "error" error_code enum no Error mnemonics. Filled in if the status parameter is "error" Requirements for wav files for speech analytics Record a call in stereo mode with two audio channels: employee speech in one channel, client speech in another channel. 16 bit PCM Sampling rates: 8000 Hz Frequency range no worse than 330-3400 Hz; Signal-to-noise ratio in the frequency range 330-3400 Hz: no less than 15 dB; Minimum duration of speech signal 16 seconds; File size no more than 50Mb Requirements for the service that will provide call recordings when downloading them from the provided URL The response to a request to download wav files must contain the Content-Type: audio/wav header In response to a request to download mp3 files there must be a Content-Type header: audio/mpeg JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "upload.calls", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "calls": [ { "callback": { "url": "string", "events": [ ] }, "ext_id": "string", "direction": "enum", "calling_phone_number": "string", "called_phone_number": "string", "start_time": "iso8601", "finish_time": "iso8601", "is_lost": "boolean", "is_transfer": "boolean", "visitor_session_id": "number", "site_id": "number", "campaign_id": "number", "source_id": "number", "wait_duration": "number", "talk_duration": "number", "comment": "string", "tags": [ { "tag_id": "number", "tag_name": "string" } ], "wav_records": [ { "employee_channel": "enum", "employee_name": "string", "employee_id": "number", "record_url": "string" } ], "mp3_records": [ { "employee_name": "string", "employee_id": "number", "record_url": "string" } ] } ] } } ### JSON response structure
The response comes as soon as the system has saved the calls for further processing. When the call is processed, a web-hook will be sent with the processing status.
```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "data": { "success": "true" } } } JSON structure about processing status```json { "ext_id": "string", "call_session_id": "number", "status": "enum", "timestamp": "number", "error_message": "string", "error_code": "enum" } ### Example for speech analytics, loading a call from a subscriber with several employees with one wav file The client downloads a call in which there was a transfer and a conversation between the subscriber and several employees.```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "upload.calls", "params": { "access_token": "string", "calls": [ { "ext_id": "test1", "direction": "in", "calling_phone_number": "89262444397", "called_phone_number": "84955140576", "start_time": "2019-07-01 12:00:00", "finish_time": "2019-07-01 12:00:30", "is_lost": false, "is_transfer": true, "wait_duration": 10, "talk_duration": 20, "tags": [ { "tag_name": "Целевой" }, { "tag_name": "Тест" } ], "wav_records": [ { "employee_channel": "left", "employee_name": "Иван Васильевич", "record_url": "https://test.ru/shhgad-adjjsdf-ytrh" }, { "employee_channel": "right", "employee_name": "Александр Васильевич", "record_url": "https://test.ru/shhgad-adjjsdf" } ] } ] } } Example for speech analytics, downloading a call between a subscriber and an employee in one wav file The client downloads a call in which the subscriber spoke with one employee.```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "upload.calls", "params": { "access_token": "string", "calls": [ { "ext_id": "test1", "direction": "in", "calling_phone_number": "89262444397", "called_phone_number": "84955140576", "start_time": "2019-07-01 12:00:00", "finish_time": "2019-07-01 12:00:30", "is_lost": false, "wait_duration": 10, "talk_duration": 20, "tags": [ { "tag_name": "Целевой" }, { "tag_name": "Тест" } ], "wav_records": [ { "employee_channel": "left", "employee_name": "Иван Васильевич", "record_url": "https://test.ru/shhgad-adjjsdf-xxxx" } ] } ] } } ### Example for end-to-end analytics, loading calls from third-party call tracking```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "upload.calls", "params": { "access_token": "string", "calls": [ { "ext_id": "test1", "direction": "in", "calling_phone_number": "89262444397", "called_phone_number": "84955140576", "start_time": "2019-07-01 12:00:00", "finish_time": "2019-07-01 12:00:30", "is_lost": false, "campaign_id": 435, "source_id": -1, "site_id": 24, "tags": [ { "tag_name": "Целевой" }, { "tag_name": "Тест" } ], "mp3_records": [ { "record_url": "https://test.ru/shhgad-adjjsdf-xxxx" } ] } ] } } Example for end-to-end analytics, loading calls from a call back form```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "upload.calls", "params": { "access_token": "string", "calls": [ { "ext_id": "test1", "direction": "in", "calling_phone_number": "89262444397", "called_phone_number": "84955140576", "start_time": "2019-07-01 12:00:00", "finish_time": "2019-07-01 12:00:30", "is_lost": false, "visitor_session_id": 435, "tags": [ { "tag_name": "Целевой" }, { "tag_name": "Тест" } ], "mp3_records": [ { "record_url": "https://test.ru/shhgad-adjjsdf-xxxx" } ] } ] } } ### Example of a call processing status notification```json { "ext_id": "test1", "call_session_id": "1564545", "status": "processed", "timestamp": "1562156217" } List of returned errors Parameter Meaning max_file_size_download_error The maximum file size has been exceeded. Currently - 50 MB. decode_error Could not open the conversation file, the first bytes are missing in the mp3 - ID3 and wav - RIFF files, or an error occurred during the decoding process. wav_min_duration_processing_error The downloaded wav file is shorter than 16 seconds. wav_channels_processing_error The downloaded wav file does not contain 2 channels. wav_processing_error Error when processing wav file when encoding the file to the required parameters. connection_download_error Error connecting to the server. Network problem. http_status_download_error The server from which we downloaded the file did not respond 200. http_content_type_download_error Content-Type is out of specification. timeout_download_error It took a very long time to download a file or a very long time to connect to the server. Maximum time - 30 seconds See the section "List of errors for methods with the create verb"

docs.text:
{ "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "upload.calls", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "calls": [ { "callback": { "url": "string", "events": [ ] }, "ext_id": "string", "direction": "enum", "calling_phone_number": "string", "called_phone_number": "string", "start_time": "iso8601", "finish_time": "iso8601", "is_lost": "boolean", "is_transfer": "boolean", "visitor_session_id": "number", "site_id": "number", "campaign_id": "number", "source_id": "number", "wait_duration": "number", "talk_duration": "number", "comment": "string", "tags": [ { "tag_id": "number", "tag_name": "string" } ], "wav_records": [ { "employee_channel": "enum", "employee_name": "string", "employee_id": "number", "record_url": "string" } ], "mp3_records": [ { "employee_name": "string", "employee_id": "number", "record_url": "string" } ] } ] } } ### JSON response structure
The response comes as soon as the system has saved the calls for further processing. When the call is processed, a web-hook will be sent with the processing status.
```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "data": { "success": "true" } } }
docs.title: JSON request structure```json

docs.text: { "ext_id": "string", "call_session_id": "number", "status": "enum", "timestamp": "number", "error_message": "string", "error_code": "enum" } ### Example for speech analytics, loading a call from a subscriber with several employees with one wav file The client downloads a call in which there was a transfer and a conversation between the subscriber and several employees.```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "upload.calls", "params": { "access_token": "string", "calls": [ { "ext_id": "test1", "direction": "in", "calling_phone_number": "89262444397", "called_phone_number": "84955140576", "start_time": "2019-07-01 12:00:00", "finish_time": "2019-07-01 12:00:30", "is_lost": false, "is_transfer": true, "wait_duration": 10, "talk_duration": 20, "tags": [ { "tag_name": "Целевой" }, { "tag_name": "Тест" } ], "wav_records": [ { "employee_channel": "left", "employee_name": "Иван Васильевич", "record_url": "https://test.ru/shhgad-adjjsdf-ytrh" }, { "employee_channel": "right", "employee_name": "Александр Васильевич", "record_url": "https://test.ru/shhgad-adjjsdf" } ] } ] } }
docs.title: JSON structure about processing status```json

docs.text: The client downloads a call in which the subscriber spoke with one employee.```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "upload.calls", "params": { "access_token": "string", "calls": [ { "ext_id": "test1", "direction": "in", "calling_phone_number": "89262444397", "called_phone_number": "84955140576", "start_time": "2019-07-01 12:00:00", "finish_time": "2019-07-01 12:00:30", "is_lost": false, "wait_duration": 10, "talk_duration": 20, "tags": [ { "tag_name": "Целевой" }, { "tag_name": "Тест" } ], "wav_records": [ { "employee_channel": "left", "employee_name": "Иван Васильевич", "record_url": "https://test.ru/shhgad-adjjsdf-xxxx" } ] } ] } } ### Example for end-to-end analytics, loading calls from third-party call tracking```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "upload.calls", "params": { "access_token": "string", "calls": [ { "ext_id": "test1", "direction": "in", "calling_phone_number": "89262444397", "called_phone_number": "84955140576", "start_time": "2019-07-01 12:00:00", "finish_time": "2019-07-01 12:00:30", "is_lost": false, "campaign_id": 435, "source_id": -1, "site_id": 24, "tags": [ { "tag_name": "Целевой" }, { "tag_name": "Тест" } ], "mp3_records": [ { "record_url": "https://test.ru/shhgad-adjjsdf-xxxx" } ] } ] } }
docs.title: Example for speech analytics, downloading a call between a subscriber and an employee in one wav file

docs.text: { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "upload.calls", "params": { "access_token": "string", "calls": [ { "ext_id": "test1", "direction": "in", "calling_phone_number": "89262444397", "called_phone_number": "84955140576", "start_time": "2019-07-01 12:00:00", "finish_time": "2019-07-01 12:00:30", "is_lost": false, "visitor_session_id": 435, "tags": [ { "tag_name": "Целевой" }, { "tag_name": "Тест" } ], "mp3_records": [ { "record_url": "https://test.ru/shhgad-adjjsdf-xxxx" } ] } ] } } ### Example of a call processing status notification```json { "ext_id": "test1", "call_session_id": "1564545", "status": "processed", "timestamp": "1562156217" }

docs.text: Parameter Meaning max_file_size_download_error The maximum file size has been exceeded. Currently - 50 MB. decode_error Could not open the conversation file, the first bytes are missing in the mp3 - ID3 and wav - RIFF files, or an error occurred during the decoding process. wav_min_duration_processing_error The downloaded wav file is shorter than 16 seconds. wav_channels_processing_error The downloaded wav file does not contain 2 channels. wav_processing_error Error when processing wav file when encoding the file to the required parameters. connection_download_error Error connecting to the server. Network problem. http_status_download_error The server from which we downloaded the file did not respond 200. http_content_type_download_error Content-Type is out of specification. timeout_download_error It took a very long time to download a file or a very long time to connect to the server. Maximum time - 30 seconds See the section "List of errors for methods with the create verb"
docs.title: List of returned errors

docs.text: Loading communications > Loading chats Method upload.chats Description Loading chats Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API, Loading offline applications from an external system Maximum number of applications in one request 50 pcs Required parameters: - visitor_session_id, campaign_id or site_id (if several parameters are specified, the data must be consistent) - phone or email Request parameters Title Type Required Valid values ​​ Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" chats array yes List of chats. Maximum 50 start_date_time iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Date and time the chat was created Cannot be in the future. Must be later than the transmitted visitor session. phone string no Visitor phone number in E164 format email string no Visitor Email status enum yes lost, succeeded, refused Chat status lost; succeed; refused If the initiator is visitor and there are no message messages from the operator or visitor, then the passed value in status is ignored and the value is set to lost initiator enum no operator, visitor, autoinvite Chat initiator autoinvite, visitor, operator If the parameter is not passed, the first message source ("source") will be taken visitor_session_id number no Unique identifier of the visitor session received from CallGear. To get the ID, you must use the JS API method Comagic.getSessionId() . In this case, the session must be created no earlier than 180 дней to date_time campaign_id number no Unique identifier for an advertising campaign in CallGear. To get campaign_id you can use the Data API method "get.campaigns" . You cannot pass campaign_id = -1. source_id number no Unique source identifier. It is possible to transfer only a non-remote source in the context of the client. If visitor_session_id is passed, then we will define source_id using the session parameters. messages array yes List of chat messages date_time iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Date and time the message was sent Cannot be in the future. Must be later than start_date_time. If the parameter is not passed, the time of the call will be entered source enum yes operator, visitor, system Message Source system, visitor, operator employee_id number no Unique employee identifier, required parameter if source = operator(Operator) The last employee who sent the message will be assigned a chat message string yes Message ext_id string no Уникальный идентификатор чата в вашей системе JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "upload.chats", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "chats": [ { "start_date_time": "iso8601", "name": "string", "phone": "string", "email": "string", "status": "enum [lost,succeed, refused]", "initiator": "enum [operator, visitor,autoinvite]", "visitor_session_id": "number", "campaign_id": "number", "source_id": "number", "site_id": "number", "messages": [ { "date_time": "iso8601", "source": "enum [operator, visitor, system]", "employee_id": "number", "message": "string" } ], "ext_id": "string" } ] } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "data": [ { "id": "number" } ], "metadata": "object" } } List of returned errors Look at the section "List of errors for methods with the verb upload"

docs.text: Loading communications > Downloading emails Method upload.emails Description Downloading emails Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Email tracking Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" emails array no Array of letters site_id number no Site ID. Method for getting a list of existing sites: "get.sites" session_id number no Session ID source_id number no Source ID. Method for getting a list of existing Sources: "get.get_sources" date_time date yes Date and time of receipt of the letter by email in the client's time zone sender_name string no Sender's name subject string no Email subject message string yes Text of the letter. message_html string yes HTML emails. email_from string yes Sender. email_to string yes Recipient. One of the fields is required: email_to, email_to_cc, email_to_bcc email_to_cc array no Copy. email_to_bcc array no Bcc. Response parameters Name Type Valid values Filtering Sorting Description id number yes Unique identifier of the downloaded letter JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"upload.emails", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "user_id":"number", "emails":[ { "date_time": "2023-02-16 00:00:00", "session_id": 122343, "source_id": -999, "site_id": 258, "sender_name": "Имя", "subject": "Тема", "message": "Сообщение", "message_html": "HTML", "email_from": "email_from@gmail.com", "email_to": "email_to@gmail.com", "email_to_cc": ["email_cc@gmail.com"], "email_to_bcc": ["email_bcc@gmail.com"] } ] } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": [ { "id": "number" } ] } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the verb get"

docs.text: Loading communications > Uploading offline applications Method upload.offline_messages Description Uploading offline applications Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API, Loading offline applications from an external system Maximum number of applications in one request 50 pcs Required parameters: - visitor_session_id, campaign_id or site_id (if several parameters are specified, the data must be consistent) - phone or email Request parameters Title Type Required Valid values ​​ Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" offline_messages array yes List of offline applications. Maximum 50 date_time iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Date and time the request was created. Can't be in the future. Must be greater than the transmitted visitor session. If the parameter is not passed, the time of the call will be entered phone string yes, if not specified email Visitor phone number in E164 format email string yes, if not specified phone Visitor Email message string no Visitor message visitor_session_id number yes, if campaign_id or site_id is not specified Unique identifier of the visitor session received from CallGear. To get the ID, you must use the JS API method Comagic.getSessionId() . In this case, the session must be created no earlier than 180 дней to date_time campaign_id number yes, if visitor_session_id or site_id is not specified Unique identifier for an advertising campaign in CallGear. To get campaign_id you can use the Data API method "get.campaigns" . If "campaign_id": -1 is transmitted, then be sure to specify site_id . source_id number no Unique source identifier. It is possible to transfer only a non-remote source in the context of the client. If visitor_session_id is passed, then we will define source_id using the session parameters. site_id number yes, if campaign_id or visitor_session_id is not specified Unique site identifier. form_name string no Name of the custom JS Form. user_fields array no Custom fields added to the application. Before passing, you need to create a user field using the method "create.offline_message_user_field" JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "upload.offline_messages", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "offline_messages": [ { "date_time": "iso8601", "name": "string", "phone": "string", "email": "string", "message": "string", "visitor_session_id": "number", "campaign_id": "number", "source_id": "number", "site_id": "number", "form_name": "string", "ext_id": "string", "user_fields": [ { "ext_id": "string", "value": "string" }, { "ext_id": "string", "value": "string" } ] } ] } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "data": [ { "id": "number" } ], "metadata": "object" } } List of returned errors Look at the section "List of errors for methods with the verb upload"

docs.text: Create an offline source Creating an offline source > Creating an offline source Method create.communication_source Description Creating an offline source Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the ["get.customer_users"](../partners.md#user-content-get.customer_users) method name string no Name of the Offline source. На текущий момент не используется description string no Description of Offline source. На текущий момент не используется entity enum yes chat Chat call Call Communication filter mnemonic source_id number yes User Source ID. To get a list of Sources you must use the "get.sources" method state enum yes active Offline Source active off Offline Source disabled Source Source Offline Status priority number no End-to-end identifier used for sorting. Condition filter used in the custom source filter object Filtering conditions used in the Offline source. The maximum nesting structure is OR . For a list of available filtering conditions, see section ["Getting a list of possible filtering conditions for a source"](../get_communication_source_filters) filters array yes An expression that can contain both simple filters and a filter tree field string Field of the entity to which filtering will be applied (the list is predefined for the method) operator enum Filtering operator. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section ["Filtering Operators"](../index.md#_filterOperators) value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "HXw4IeLYAfblv6FRkzRNd", "method": "create.communication_source", "params": { "name": "", "description": "", "entity": "call", "source_id": -1, "state": "active", "filter": { "filters": [ { "field": "virtual_phone_number", "value": "792222222222", "operator": "=" }, { "field": "virtual_phone_number", "value": "79111111111", "operator": "=" } ], "condition": "or" }, "priority": 1102 } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "HXw4IeLYAfblv6FRkzRNd", "result": { "data": { "id": 38 }, "metadata": { "version": null, "limits": {} } } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the verb create"

docs.text: Address book > Editing a contact in the address book Method update.contacts Description Editing a contact in the address book Available to Agent, Client Partial updating is possible. If the data array is updated, the transferred array will completely replace the existing one. Request parameters Title Type Required Valid values ​​ Description access_token string yes Authentication session key id number yes Unique identifier for a contact in the address book user_id number no Unique user identifier of the client agent on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" first_name string no Contact name last_name string yes Contact's last name patronymic string no Contact's middle name emails array no Maximum 10 addresses The contact's email address. E-mail must be unique in the list. phone_numbers array yes Maximum 10 rooms List of contact numbers in E164 format The number must be unique in the list. personal_manager_id number no A personal manager is an employee responsible for working with a client. When creating the "Forwarding to a personal manager" scenario, customer calls will be sent to personal managers without additional settings for the list of caller numbers and the list of employee phone numbers. To obtain a list of employees, use the "get.employees" method organization_id number no Unique identifier of the organization. For a list of organizations, see method "get.contact_organizations" . groups array no For a list of unique group identifiers that the contact is a member of, see the "get.group_contacts" method. JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "method":"update.contacts", "id":"number", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "id":"number", "user_id":"number", "last_name":"string", "first_name":"string", "patronymic":"string", "emails":[ "email" ], "groups":[ "group_id" ], "phone_numbers":[ "number" ], "personal_manager_id":"number", "organization_id":"number" } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "result":{ } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the update verb"

docs.text: Creating a CRM source > Creating a CRM source Method create.crm_source Description Creating a CRM source Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the ["get.customer_users"](../Partners.md#get_customer_user) method name string no Name of CRM source. На текущий момент не используется description string no Description of CRM source. На текущий момент не используется source_id number yes User Source ID. To get a list of Sources you must use the "get.sources" method state enum yes active CRM Source active off CRM Source disabled Source Source CRM Status priority number no End-to-end identifier used for sorting. Condition filter used in the custom source filter object Filtering conditions used in the custom source. The maximum nesting structure is OR . To get a list of available filtering conditions, see section ["Getting a list of possible filtering conditions for a source"](../get_crm_source_filters) filters array yes An expression that can contain both simple filters and a filter tree field string Field of the entity to which filtering will be applied (the list is predefined for the method) operator enum Filtering operator. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section ["Filtering Operators"](../index.md#_filterOperators) value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "HXw4IeLYAfblv6FRkzRNd", "method": "create.crm_source", "params": { "name": "", "description": "", "source_id": -1, "state": "active", "filter": { "filters": [ { "field": "referrer_domain", "value": "ozon.", "operator": "ilike" }, { "field": "utm_referrer", "value": "ozon.", "operator": "ilike" } ], "condition": "or" }, "priority": 1102 } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "HXw4IeLYAfblv6FRkzRNd", "result": { "data": { "id": 38 }, "metadata": { "version": null, "limits": {} } } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the verb create"

docs.text: Name Type Required Allowed values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" name string yes Rule name. description string no Description of the rule. rule_type string yes site_emails - Substitution on the site external_area - Email from third-party sites Rule type traffic_type text yes all - All traffic custom_sources - Custom traffic settings Traffic type for email-tracking tracking_type text yes static, dynamic Email tracking type substitution_type string Allowed and required only for tracking_type = dynamic. auto_generation - Automatic generation of 10,000 mail manual_pool - Manual entry of mail Method of forming an Email pool for spoofing state text yes active - Active rule draft - Draft Email tracking rule status sources array Required tracking_type = dynamic and traffic_type = custom_sources, otherwise absent List of sources for which this rule is used. source_channel_id number yes Source channel ID. Method for getting a list of existing channels: "get.get_sources_channels" source_group_id number no Source group ID. Method for getting a list of existing groups: "get.get_sources_groups" source_id number no Source ID. Method for getting a list of existing Sources: "get.get_sources" external_replacement_emails_settings array Can only be present in a request if tracking_type = static AND rule_type = external_area Setting up static emails on third-party sites. email_account_id number yes Email address to display on the site: "get.email_accounts". child_customer_id number Identifier of the client for whom the mailbox was created. Method for getting a list of clients: "get.customers" source object no List of sources for which the guarantee is configured. If you need to select All traffic, null is passed to this parameter source_channel_id number yes Source channel ID. Method for getting a list of existing channels: "get.get_sources_channels" source_group_id number no Source group ID. Method for getting a list of existing groups: "get.get_sources_groups" source_id number no Source ID. Method for getting a list of existing groups: "get.replacement_emails_groups" site_id number yes Site ID. email_account_id number yes Email address to display on the site: "get.email_accounts". source object no List of sources for which the block is configured. If you need to select All traffic, null is passed to this parameter source_channel_id number yes Source channel ID. Method for getting a list of existing groups: "get.get_sources_groups" source_id number no Source ID. Method for getting a list of existing Sources: "get.get_sources" dynamic_replacement_emails_settings array Can only be present in a request if tracking_type = dynamic Setting up dynamic email. replacement_emails_groups array Required for rule_type = site_emails Groups of emails and sites to replace with spoofed emails. id number yes Email group ID. Method for getting a list of existing groups: "get.replacement_emails_groups" site_id number yes Site ID. email_account_id number yes Email address to display on the site: "get.email_accounts". email_accounts array Acceptable and required when substitution_type = manual_pool List of emails for replacement in case of manual dialing of emails.

docs.text: Employees > Creating an employee Method create.employees Description Creating an employee Available to Agent, Client Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" first_name string no Employee name last_name string yes Employee last name patronymic string no Employee's middle name status enum no available break do_not_disturb not_at_workplace not_at_work unknown Employee status available - Available break - Break do_not_disturb - Do not disturb not_at_workplace - Out of office not_at_work - Not at work unknown - Unknown calls_available boolean no true , false The parameter will be removed shortly. Use the parameters instead: in_external_allowed_call_directions, in_internal_allowed_call_directions The default value is "true" . Availability for calls allowed_in_call_types array no internal external The parameter will be removed shortly. Use the parameters instead: in_external_allowed_call_directions, in_internal_allowed_call_directions What types of incoming calls are allowed to an employee? internal - internal calls from company employees external - external calls from clients in_external_allowed_call_directions array no in out What call directions are an employee allowed for incoming external calls? in - incoming calls out - outgoing calls in_internal_allowed_call_directions array no in out What call directions are an employee allowed for incoming internal calls? in - incoming calls out - outgoing calls allowed_out_call_types array no internal external The parameter will be removed shortly. Use the parameters instead: out_external_allowed_call_directions, out_internal_allowed_call_directions What types of outgoing calls are allowed to an employee? internal - internal calls to company employees external - calls outside the company out_external_allowed_call_directions array no in out What call directions are an employee allowed for outgoing external calls? in - incoming calls out - outgoing calls out_internal_allowed_call_directions array no in out What call directions are an employee allowed for outgoing internal calls? in - incoming calls out - outgoing calls email string no Employee email address call_recording enum no all - for everyone calls; in - only for inbox; out - only for outgoing; off - disabled The default value is "all" . Call recording status Depends on the "recording" component schedule_id number no Activity graph Trainer coach object no Trainer for an employee Depends on the component "trainer" coach_always_enabled boolean no true , false By default "false" . When this option is activated, all incoming calls employee will be duplicated to his trainer. The "true" value can be set if specified parameter "coach_id" . coach_id number yes Unique trainer identifier Groups in which the employee belongs groups array no List of unique identifiers of groups in which it belongs employee Phones phone_numbers array no 10 pieces Employee phone list It is important to understand that when creating a new employee the number may already exist with another employee and if new parameters are passed to the number, they will be also updated an existing number phone_number string yes Employee phone number. The number format can be with additional dialing, for example "74955140578...2345", so the number does not E164 format If SIP is specified, then we do not make connections, but simply add as a PSTN type number, i.e. like a regular number channels_count number no From 1 to 150 The default value is "1" . Number of lines on the phone. dial_time number no From 1 to 100 The default value is "60" . Phone call time. Value in seconds. status enum no active , inactive The default value is "active" . Number status. Internal number extension object no Employee internal number extension_phone_number string yes Maximum length 5 Extension number extension_voice_mail_enabled boolean no true , false Default value "false" . If all numbers specified for this employee in phone list is busy, then the caller will prompted to leave a voice message. extension_queue_enabled boolean no true , false Default value "false" . If all numbers specified for this employee in phone list is busy, the caller will be put in a queue to redial the phones in the list and will wait for the first one vacant number. Is the employee a chat operator operator object no Workplace operator Depends on the component "consultant" operator_display_name string yes Operator name in chat operator_login string yes Employee login to enter the Workplace application operator" operator_password string yes Minimum length 8 Employee password for logging into the Workplace application operator" operator_position_id number no Employee position in signature operator_offline_message_enabled boolean no true , false The default value is "false" . Is it allowed to process applications operator_invite_to_chat_enabled boolean no true , false The default value is "false" . Is it allowed to invite to chat operator_chat_enabled boolean no true , false The default value is "true" . Is it allowed to participate in chats with visitors operator_sites array no List of unique site identifiers for which it is available employee Response parameters Title Type Required Description id number yes Unique employee identifier JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"create.employees", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "user_id":"number", "first_name":"string", "last_name":"string", "patronymic":"string", "status": "enum", "calls_available":"boolean", "allowed_in_call_types": "array", "in_external_allowed_call_directions": "array", "in_internal_allowed_call_directions": "array", "allowed_out_call_types": "array", "out_external_allowed_call_directions": "array", "out_internal_allowed_call_directions": "array", "email":"string", "groups":[ "group_id" ], "call_recording":"enum", "schedule_id":"number", "coach":{ "coach_always_enabled":"boolean", "coach_id":"number" }, "phone_numbers":[ { "phone_number":"string", "channels_count":"number", "dial_time":"number", "status":"enum" } ], "extension":{ "extension_phone_number":"string", "extension_voice_mail_enabled":"boolean", "extension_queue_enabled":"boolean" }, "operator":{ "operator_login":"string", "operator_display_name": "string", "operator_password":"string", "operator_position_id":"number", "operator_offline_message_enabled":"boolean", "operator_invite_to_chat_enabled":"boolean", "operator_chat_enabled":"boolean", "operator_sites":[ "site_id" ] } } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "result":{ "id":"number" } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the create verb"

docs.text: Employees > Aggregated statistics for employees Aggregated statistics for employees Method get.employee_stat Description Getting aggregated statistics on employees The method is available when the "call_center" component is connected Available to Agent, Client Request parameters Title Type Required Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the client agent on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" limit number no Number of records returned. See section "Paging" offset number no Shift determines from which record number to return "limit" records. Default is "0". See section "Paging" filter object no See section "Filtering criteria" fields array no See section "View of returned data" sort array no See section "Sorting data" date_from iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss date_till iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss only_default_statuses_in_stats boolean no A sign that allows you to select a statistics option based on the time spent in statuses. Default is "true". Response parameters Name Type Valid values Filtering Sorting Description id number yes Unique employee identifier first_name string yes yes Employee name last_name string yes yes Employee's last name patronymic string yes Employee's middle name full_name string yes yes Last name First name Patronymic Information on employee status status_stats object yes Statistics of employee statuses. To get a complete list of statuses, you must use the "get.statuses" method. The contents of the parameter depend on the only_default_statuses_in_stats parameter: if the value is true , the key is the status mnemonic, the value is time in seconds if the value is false , the key is a unique status identifier, the value is time in seconds, statistics on deleted statuses are also available if there is data for the selected period Employee groups groups array yes Groups in which the employee belongs group_id number Unique group identifier group_name string Group name JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "get.employee_stat", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "offset": "number", "limit": "number", "date_from": "iso8601", "date_till": "iso8601", "filter": {}, "sort": [ { "field": "string", "order": "string" } ], "fields": [ "string" ] } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": {}, "data": [ { "id": "number", "first_name": "string", "last_name": "string", "patronymic": "string", "full_name": "string", "groups": [ { "group_name": "string", "group_id": "number" } ], "status_stats": { "string": "number" } } ] } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the verb get"
