docs.text: Employees > Getting a list of employees Getting a list of employees Method get.employees Description Getting a list of employees Available to Agent, Client Request parameters Title Type Required Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the client agent on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" limit number no Number of records returned. See section "Paging" offset number no Shift determines from which record number to return "limit" records. Default is "0". See section "Paging" filter object no See section "Filtering criteria" fields array no See section "View of returned data" sort array no See section "Sorting data" Response parameters Name Type Valid values Filtering Sorting Description id number yes Unique employee identifier login string yes yes User login to access your personal account first_name string yes yes Employee name last_name string yes yes Employee's last name patronymic string yes Employee's middle name full_name string yes yes Last name First name Patronymic status enum available break do_not_disturb not_at_workplace not_at_work unknown yes The parameter will be removed shortly. Use the status_id parameter instead Employee status. Will be filled in if the employee has a standard status selected available - Available break - Break do_not_disturb - Do not disturb not_at_workplace - Out of office not_at_work - Not at work auto_out_call - Outgoing call unknown - Unknown status_id number yes Unique status identifier. To get a complete list of statuses, you must use the "get.statuses" method calls_available boolean true , false yes yes The parameter will be removed shortly. Use the parameters instead: in_external_allowed_call_directions, in_internal_allowed_call_directions Availability for calls allowed_in_call_types array internal external yes The parameter will be removed shortly. Use the parameters instead: in_external_allowed_call_directions, in_internal_allowed_call_directions What types of incoming calls are allowed to an employee? internal - internal calls from company employees external - external calls from clients in_external_allowed_call_directions array in out yes What call directions are an employee allowed for incoming external calls? in - incoming calls out - outgoing calls in_internal_allowed_call_directions array in out yes What call directions are an employee allowed for incoming internal calls? in - incoming calls out - outgoing calls allowed_out_call_types array internal external yes The parameter will be removed shortly. Use the parameters instead: out_external_allowed_call_directions, out_internal_allowed_call_directions What types of outgoing calls are allowed to an employee? internal - internal calls to company employees external - calls outside the company out_external_allowed_call_directions array in out yes What call directions are an employee allowed for outgoing external calls? in - incoming calls out - outgoing calls out_internal_allowed_call_directions array in out yes What call directions are an employee allowed for outgoing internal calls? in - incoming calls out - outgoing calls email string yes Employee email address call_recording enum all - for all calls; in - incoming only; out - for outgoing only; off - disabled yes Call recording status schedule_id number yes Unique identifier of the activity graph schedule_name string yes Name of the activity graph Trainer coach object yes Trainer for an employee coach_full_name string Teacher's full name coach_id number Unique trainer identifier Selected from the list of employees coach_always_enabled boolean true , false When this option is activated, all incoming calls from the employee will be duplicated to his trainer. Employee groups groups array yes Groups the employee belongs to group_id number Unique group identifier group_name string Group name Phones phone_numbers array 10 pieces yes List of employee phone numbers. The list of numbers must be sorted by priority. phone_id number Unique employee phone identifier phone_number string Employee phone number. Number format maybe with additional recruitment, for example "74955140578...2345" , so the number does not have E164 format If SIP is specified, then we don’t do it links, but simply add as PSTN type number, i.e. as usual number channels_count number From 1 to 150 Default value "1" . Quantity lines on the phone dial_time number From 1 to 100 Default value "60" . Call time by phone. Value in seconds. status enum active , inactive Default value "active" . Status numbers. Internal number extension object yes Extension number and its settings extension_phone_number string Maximum length 5 Extension number extension_voice_mail_enabled boolean If all numbers specified for this employee in the phone list, are busy, then the calling subscriber will prompted to leave a voice message. extension_queue_enabled boolean If all numbers specified for this employee in the phone list, are busy, the caller will stand up queue to redial phones on the list and will be waiting first vacant number. The employee is a chat operator operator object Workstation operator operator_display_name string Operator name in chat operator_login string Operator login to enter the application "Operator's workplace" operator_position_id number Unique identifier of the position operator in signature operator_position_name string Operator position name in signature operator_offline_message_enabled boolean Is it allowed to process applications operator_invite_to_chat_enabled boolean Is it allowed to invite to chat operator_chat_enabled boolean Is it allowed to participate in chats with visitors operator_chats_available boolean true , false Chat availability Website operator_sites array List of unique identifiers and website addresses for which it is available operator site_id number Unique site identifier site_domain_name string Site address on the Internet. Without indication protocol - "http://" or "https://" . JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"get.employees", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "user_id":"number", "offset":"number", "limit":"number", "filter":{ }, "sort":[ { "field":"string", "order":"string" } ], "fields":[ "string" ] } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "result":{ "metadata":{ }, "data":[ { "id":"number", "first_name":"string", "login":"string", "last_name":"string", "patronymic":"string", "full_name":"string", "email":"string", "status": "enum", "calls_available":"boolean", "allowed_in_call_types": "array", "in_external_allowed_call_directions": "array", "in_internal_allowed_call_directions": "array", "allowed_out_call_types": "array", "out_external_allowed_call_directions": "array", "out_internal_allowed_call_directions": "array", "groups":[ { "group_id":"number", "group_name":"string" } ], "call_recording":"enum", "schedule_id":"number", "schedule_name":"string", "coach":{ "coach_id":"number", "coach_full_name":"string", "coach_always_enabled":"boolean" }, "phone_numbers":[ { "phone_id": "integer", "phone_number":"string", "channels_count":"number", "dial_time":"number", "status":"enum" } ], "extension":{ "extension_phone_number":"string", "extension_voice_mail_enabled":"boolean", "extension_queue_enabled":"boolean" }, "operator":{ "operator_login":"string", "operator_display_name": "string", "operator_position_id":"number", "operator_position_name":"string", "operator_offline_message_enabled":"boolean", "operator_invite_to_chat_enabled":"boolean", "operator_chat_enabled":"boolean", "operator_chats_available":"boolean", "operator_sites":[ { "site_id":"number", "site_domain_name":"string" } ] } } ] } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the verb get"

See section "Paging" filter object no See section "Filtering criteria" fields array no See section "View of returned data" sort array no See section "Sorting data" Response parameters Name Type Valid values Filtering Sorting Description id number yes Unique group identifier name string yes yes Group name List of employees in the group members array List of unique employee identifiers, who are in the group employee_id number Unique employee identifier employee_full_name string F.I.O. employee List of employee numbers in the group and their availability phone_numbers array yes List of landline, mobile and sip numbers employees who are part of the group, indicating their availability and call priority. Priority dialing numbers is determined by the position of the number in list. Calling a specified list of numbers in a group possible by internal group number (see. parameter "group_phone_number" ). To change priority and number availability in the group, see method "update.group_employees_numbers" employee_phone_number string Employee phone number employee_phone_number_id number Unique identifier of the employee number in group employee_full_name string F.I.O. employee employee_id number Unique employee identifier available boolean Number availability in group Setting the internal group number group_phone_number string Maximum length 5 yes yes Internal group number queue_enabled boolean yes The default value is "false" . docs.text: Employees > Editing an employee Method update.employees Description Creating an employee Available to Agent, Client Partial updating is possible. If the data array is updated, the transferred array will completely replace the existing one. Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key id number yes Unique employee identifier user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" first_name string no Employee name last_name string yes Employee last name patronymic string no Employee's middle name status enum no available break do_not_disturb not_at_workplace not_at_work auto_out_call unknown The parameter will be removed shortly. Use the status_id parameter instead Employee status available - Available break - Break do_not_disturb - Do not disturb not_at_workplace - Out of office not_at_work - Not at work auto_out_call - Outgoing call unknown - Unknown status_id number no Unique status identifier. To get a complete list of statuses, you must use the "get.statuses" method calls_available boolean no true , false The parameter will be removed shortly. Use the parameters instead: in_external_allowed_call_directions, in_internal_allowed_call_directions Availability for calls allowed_in_call_types array no internal external The parameter will be removed shortly. Use the parameters instead: in_external_allowed_call_directions, in_internal_allowed_call_directions What types of incoming calls are allowed to an employee? internal - internal calls from company employees external - external calls from clients in_external_allowed_call_directions array no in out What call directions are an employee allowed for incoming external calls? in - incoming calls out - outgoing calls in_internal_allowed_call_directions array no in out What call directions are an employee allowed for incoming internal calls? in - incoming calls out - outgoing calls allowed_out_call_types array no internal external The parameter will be removed shortly. Use the parameters instead: out_external_allowed_call_directions, out_internal_allowed_call_directions What types of outgoing calls are allowed to an employee? internal - internal calls to company employees external - calls outside the company out_external_allowed_call_directions array no in out What call directions are an employee allowed for outgoing external calls? in - incoming calls out - outgoing calls out_internal_allowed_call_directions array no in out What call directions are an employee allowed for outgoing internal calls? in - incoming calls out - outgoing calls email string no Employee email address call_recording enum no all - for all calls; in - incoming only; out - for outgoing only; off - disabled Call recording status Depends on the component "recording" schedule_id number no Activity graph Trainer coach object no Trainer for employee Depends on the component "trainer" coach_always_enabled boolean no true , false When this option is activated, all incoming calls from the employee will be be duplicated to his coach. The "true" value can be set if specified parameter "coach_id" . coach_id number no Unique trainer identifier Groups in which the employee belongs groups array no List of unique identifiers of groups in which it belongs employee Phones phone_numbers array yes 10 pieces Employee phone list It is important to understand that when creating a new employee the number may already exist with another employee and if new parameters are passed to the number, they will be We also updated an existing number. phone_id number no Unique employee phone identifier from "get.employees#phone_id" We indicate this in cases where we want to change an existing number. If we do not specify, then the search is performed by phone number (phone_number): phone_number string yes Employee phone number Update logic: - the phone number is already linked to this employee - update the parameters - phone number is not associated with this employee - add him - the phone number is not in the account - create a new one and link it to the employee channels_count number no From 1 to 150 Number of lines on the phone dial_time number no From 1 to 100 Phone dialing time status enum no active , inactive Number status. Internal number extension object no Employee internal number extension_phone_number string yes Maximum length 5 Extension number extension_voice_mail_enabled boolean yes true , false If all numbers specified for this employee in phone list is busy, then the caller will prompted to leave a voice message. extension_queue_enabled boolean yes true , false If all numbers specified for this employee in phone list is busy, the caller will be put in a queue to redial the phones in the list and will wait for the first one vacant number. Is the employee a chat operator operator object no Workplace operator Depends on the component "consultant" operator_display_name string no Operator name in chat operator_login string yes Employee login to enter the Workplace application operator" operator_password string yes Minimum length 8 Employee password for logging into the Workplace application operator" operator_position_id number no Employee position in signature operator_offline_message_enabled boolean no true , false Is it allowed to process applications operator_invite_to_chat_enabled boolean no true , false Is it allowed to invite to chat operator_chat_enabled boolean no true , false Is it allowed to participate in chats with visitors operator_sites array no List of unique site identifiers for which it is available "last_name":"string", "patronymic":"string", "status": "enum", "calls_available":"boolean", "allowed_in_call_types": "array", "in_external_allowed_call_directions": "array", "in_internal_allowed_call_directions": "array", "allowed_out_call_types": "array", "out_external_allowed_call_directions": "array", "out_internal_allowed_call_directions": "array", "email":"string", "groups":[ "group_id" ], "call_recording":"enum", "schedule_id":"number", "coach":{ "coach_always_enabled":"boolean", "coach_id":"number" }, "phone_numbers":[ { "phone_number":"string", "channels_count":"number", "dial_time":"number", "status":"enum" } ], "extension":{ "extension_phone_number":"string", "extension_voice_mail_enabled":"boolean", "extension_queue_enabled":"boolean" }, "operator":{ "operator_login":"string", "operator_display_name": "string", "operator_password":"string", "operator_position_id":"number", "operator_offline_message_enabled":"boolean", "operator_invite_to_chat_enabled":"boolean", "operator_chat_enabled":"boolean", "operator_sites":[ "site_id" ] } } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "result":{ } } docs.text: Events > Getting a list of events Getting a list of events Method get.events Description Getting a list of all events Available to Agent, Client Request parameters Title Type Required Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the client agent on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" limit number no Number of records returned. See section "Paging" offset number no Shift determines from which record number to return "limit" records. Default is "0". See section "Paging" filter object no See section "Filtering criteria" fields array no See section "View of returned data" sort array no See section "Sorting data" Response parameters Name Type Valid values Filtering Sorting Description id number yes yes Unique event identifier name string yes yes Event name description string yes yes Event description site_id number yes yes Unique site identifier site_domain_name string yes yes Site address on the Internet. Without specifying the protocol - "http://" or "https://" type enum comagic - System event. Cannot be deleted track_event - Custom event. The settings use the fields category , action , action , value . ppc_goal - Integrated goals of Yandex.Metrica and Google Analytics. Always have the flag is_goal = true , the fields engine , ext_id , goal_name are filled in. link - Follow the link. The fields used are url , which stores a regular expression or tracking link. time_on_site - Time on the site. The fields value are used, which stores the value of the tracked time at which the event is triggered in the format hh:mm:ss . time_on_page - Time on a specific page of the site. The fields used are value , which stores the value of the tracked time at which the event is triggered in the format hh:mm:ss and url , which stores the tracked page of the site. click - Click on the object. The fields used are value , which stores the value of the tracked element, and url , which stores the tracked page of the site. If url is not specified, then all pages are tracked. scroll - Scrolling actions. The value fields are used, which stores the scroll type (comagic_scroll_start, comagic_scroll_end) or the tracked element to which the scroll occurs and url , in which the site page being tracked is stored. segment - Entering a segment. Used for events like segment is_goal boolean true false yes yes Whether the event is a target. For events like ppc_goal always true goal_name string yes yes Name of the target if the event has the flag is_goal = true engine enum yandex.metrika google.analytics yes yes An external analytical system that is the source of the goal. docs.text: Name Type Valid values Filtering Sorting Description id number yes yes Unique event identifier name string yes yes Event name description string yes yes Event description site_id number yes yes Unique site identifier site_domain_name string yes yes Site address on the Internet. Without specifying the protocol - "http://" or "https://" type enum comagic - System event. Cannot be deleted track_event - Custom event. The settings use the fields category , action , action , value . ppc_goal - Integrated goals of Yandex.Metrica and Google Analytics. Always have the flag is_goal = true , the fields engine , ext_id , goal_name are filled in. link - Follow the link. The fields used are url , which stores a regular expression or tracking link. time_on_site - Time on the site. The fields value are used, which stores the value of the tracked time at which the event is triggered in the format hh:mm:ss . time_on_page - Time on a specific page of the site. The fields used are value , which stores the value of the tracked time at which the event is triggered in the format hh:mm:ss and url , which stores the tracked page of the site. click - Click on the object. The fields used are value , which stores the value of the tracked element, and url , which stores the tracked page of the site. If url is not specified, then all pages are tracked. scroll - Scrolling actions. The value fields are used, which stores the scroll type (comagic_scroll_start, comagic_scroll_end) or the tracked element to which the scroll occurs and url , in which the site page being tracked is stored. segment - Entering a segment. The segment_id fields are used, which stores the identifier of the segment upon entry into which the event is triggered. yes yes Event types category string yes yes Tracked event category of type track_event action string yes yes Tracked event action of type track_event label string yes yes Tracked event label of type track_event value string yes yes Value of tracked event of type track_event or time for event type time_on_site , time_on_page or tracked element for event type click , scroll url string yes yes URL of the site page associated with the custom event type segment_id number yes yes Identifier of the segment when the event occurs. For events like ppc_goal ext_id string yes yes External target identifier from an external system. For events like ppc_goal is_active boolean true false yes yes Whether the collection of this goal from an external analytical system is enabled. For events like ppc_goal ga_category string yes yes Category for the event sent to Google Analytics ga_action string yes yes Action for the transmitted event in Google Analytics ga_label string yes yes Label for the transmitted event in Google Analytics ga_value string yes yes Value for the event sent to Google Analytics ym_goal_id string yes yes Yandex Metrics goal ID

docs.text: Loading statistics from external systems > Loading statistics from external systems Method upload.stats Description Loading statistics from external systems Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API Maximum number of costs in one request 500 pcs Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the "get.customer_users" method date_time iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss. Time is transmitted in the format 00:00:00 < Date for which we download statistics from the external system engine enum yes yandex.direct google.adwords facebook.ads vk.ads mytarget.ads vk_new.ads avito Advertising system for which statistics are loaded stats array yes Statistics on entities from the external advertising system viewpoint enum yes full Data layer. pc_ext_id string no Unique identifier of the Advertising campaign from the external system. gr_ext_id string no Unique identifier of the Ad Group from the external system. ad_ext_id string no Unique identifier of the Advertisement from the external system. kw_ext_id string no Unique identifier of the Keyword from the external system. cost number no Expenses by structure for the specified period date_time . If 0 is specified, expenses for the specified period will be deleted. shows number no Impressions by structure for the specified period date_time . If 0 is specified, expenses for the specified period will be deleted. clicks number no Clicks on the structure for the specified period date_time . If 0 is specified, expenses for the specified period will be deleted. reach number no Only for engine = facebook.ads, vk.ads, mytarget.ads, vk_new.ads, avito Clicks on the structure for the specified period date_time . If 0 is specified, expenses for the specified period will be deleted. communications number no Only for engine = avito Communications according to the structure for the specified period date_time . If 0 is specified, expenses for the specified period will be deleted. favorites number no Only for engine = avito Add to favorites by structure for the specified period date_time . If 0 is specified, expenses for the specified period will be deleted. JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "upload.stats", "params": { "access_token": "string", "date_time": "iso8601", "engine": "enum", "stats":[ { "viewpoint": "enum", "pc_ext_id": "string", "gr_ext_id": "string", "ad_ext_id": "string", "kw_ext_id": "string", "cost": "number", "shows": "number", "clicks": "number", "reach": "number", "communications": "number", "favorites": "number" } ] } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "success": "true" } } List of returned errors Look at the section "List of errors for methods with the verb upload"

docs.text: Retrieving a list of all person events for a period > Obtaining a list of all events of a person for a period Method get.person_events Description Obtaining a list of all events of a person for a period Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" limit number no You cannot request more than 200 lines. Number of records to return. Default 50 . offset number no Shift - determines from which record number to return limit records. Default 0 . person_id enum yes Unique identifier of the person for whom general information is required date_from iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Start date of main sample (limit 366 days) date_till iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss End date of the main sample fields array yes List of field mnemonics, separated by comma. For a list of available fields, see "Getting column nesting" . The order affects the construction of the tree. If the user leaves a comment (text) when generating a call back, it will be displayed in this field. Script Operations scenario_operations array yes no no List of all operations for all scenarios involved in call processing. id number Unique identifier for the script operation name string Script operation name source enum callapi - Call API Basic set callapi_management_call - Call API Call management callapi_informer_call - Call API Information call callapi_scenario_call - Call API Call script va - VATS call call_tracking - Analytics dynamic_call_tracking - Dynamic call tracking faxout - Fax sip - Outgoing from SIP sitephone - Sitephone lead - Lead Generator retailcrm - Call from retailCRM amocrm - Call from amoCRM bitrix - Call from Bitrix24 auto_back_call_by_lost_call - Auto call back for missed calls sip_trunk - Call from SIP trunk facebook_ads - Calls from Social Network Ads auto_back_call_by_offline_message - Automatic call back for requests private_number - Verification call to add a client number from your personal account auto_out_calls - Outgoing call ivr_informer - Information from IVR upload_calls - Call from an external system progressive_call - Progressive simple_dt - Simple dynamic call tracking preserved_calls - Saved redirect amocrm_extended_integration - Auto call back from CRM zoho - Zoho mytarget_ads - Calls from myTarget Ads pipedrive - Pipedrive hubspot - HubSpot smartis - Calls from Smarties partner_integration - Affiliate integration vk_ads - Calls from VK Ads omni_widget - Omnichannel widget yes yes yes Call source is_lost boolean yes yes yes Sign that the call is lost or successful communication_number number yes yes For a VATS session, the VATS is always empty, this is now the ideology of the service communication_page_url string no no no The URL of the page the visitor was on at the time of the call or the page of the visitor’s last interaction before the call. contact_phone_number string yes yes The contact number from which the call was received in the case of an incoming call or the contact number to which the call was made in the case of an outgoing call. communication_id number yes yes Unique identifier of the case communication_type enum call yes Treatment type wait_duration number yes yes The length of time a subscriber waits before the first conversation with an employee. Value in seconds. total_wait_duration number yes yes The total duration of the subscriber's waiting time on the line. Takes into account all intervals when the subscriber did not talk to the employee. Value in seconds lost_call_processing_duration number yes yes Duration of processing a missed call. It is counted from the moment of a missed conversation to the first successful one. Value in seconds talk_duration number yes yes Conversation duration. It is counted from the moment of the first conversation between the subscriber and the employee until the start of post-processing. Value in seconds clean_talk_duration number yes yes Net call duration. Takes into account only those intervals when the subscriber spoke with the employee. Value in seconds total_duration number yes yes Call duration, value in seconds postprocess_duration number yes Duration of post-processing, value in seconds call_records array yes Unique identifier of the link to the recorded conversation. docs.text: Title Type Required Valid values ​​ Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" limit number no Number of records returned. See section "Paging" offset number no Shift determines from which record number to return "limit" records. Default is "0". See section "Paging" filter object no See section "Filtering Criteria" sort array no See section "Sorting data" date_from iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Sample start date date_till iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss End date vybokri include_ongoing_calls boolean no Enable ongoing calls

docs.text: Name Type Valid values Filtering Sorting Default response Description id number yes yes Unique call session identifier start_time iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss yes yes Date and time when the call session started finish_time iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss yes Call session end time finish_reason enum yes yes yes Reason for ending the call session. A list of possible causes is provided below direction enum in - Incoming; out - Outgoing yes yes yes Call session direction cpn_region_id number yes yes yes Unique identifier of the region of the subscriber number cpn_region_name string yes yes yes Name of the region of the subscriber number cpn_country_name string yes yes yes Name of the country of the subscriber number cpn_country_id string yes yes yes Unique identifier of the country of the subscriber number properties string Callback forms may have a field with a comment (text). If the user leaves a comment (text) when generating a call back, it will be displayed in this field. Script Operations scenario_operations array yes no no List of all operations for all scenarios involved in call processing. id number Unique identifier for the script operation name string Script operation name source enum callapi - Call API Basic set callapi_management_call - Call API Call management callapi_informer_call - Call API Information call callapi_scenario_call - Call API Call script va - VATS call call_tracking - Analytics dynamic_call_tracking - Dynamic call tracking faxout - Fax sip - Outgoing from SIP sitephone - Sitephone lead - Lead Generator retailcrm - Call from retailCRM amocrm - Call from amoCRM bitrix - Call from Bitrix24 auto_back_call_by_lost_call - Auto call back for missed calls sip_trunk - Call from SIP trunk facebook_ads - Calls from Social Network Ads auto_back_call_by_offline_message - Automatic call back for requests private_number - Verification call to add a client number from your personal account auto_out_calls - Outgoing call ivr_informer - Information from IVR upload_calls - Call from an external system progressive_call - Progressive simple_dt - Simple dynamic call tracking preserved_calls - Saved redirect amocrm_extended_integration - Auto call back from CRM zoho - Zoho mytarget_ads - Calls from myTarget Ads pipedrive - Pipedrive hubspot - HubSpot smartis - Calls from Smarties partner_integration - Affiliate integration vk_ads - Calls from VK Ads omni_widget - Omnichannel widget yes yes yes Call source is_lost boolean yes yes yes Sign that the call is lost or successful communication_number number yes yes For a VATS session, the VATS is always empty, this is now the ideology of the service communication_page_url string no no no The URL of the page the visitor was on at the time of the call or the page of the visitor’s last interaction before the call. contact_phone_number string yes yes The contact number from which the call was received in the case of an incoming call or the contact number to which the call was made in the case of an outgoing call. communication_id number yes yes Unique identifier of the case communication_type enum call yes Treatment type wait_duration number yes yes The length of time a subscriber waits before the first conversation with an employee. Value in seconds. total_wait_duration number yes yes The total duration of the subscriber's waiting time on the line. Takes into account all intervals when the subscriber did not talk to the employee. Value in seconds lost_call_processing_duration number yes yes Duration of processing a missed call. It is counted from the moment of a missed conversation to the first successful one. Value in seconds talk_duration number yes yes Conversation duration. It is counted from the moment of the first conversation between the subscriber and the employee until the start of post-processing. Value in seconds clean_talk_duration number yes yes Net call duration. Takes into account only those intervals when the subscriber spoke with the employee. Value in seconds total_duration number yes yes Call duration, value in seconds postprocess_duration number yes Duration of post-processing, value in seconds call_records array yes Unique identifier of the link to the recorded conversation. You can listen by calling a request in your browser: https://app.callgear.com/system/media/talk/{communication_id}/{уникальный индентификатор ссылки на записанный разговор}/ wav_call_records array yes Unique identifier of the link to the recorded conversation in wav format. You can listen by calling a request in the browser: https://app.callgear.com/system/media/wav/{communication_id}/{уникальный индентификатор ссылки на записанный разговор в формате wav}/ full_record_file_link string yes Link to full recording of the conversation. You can listen by calling a request in the browser: https://media.callgear.com/{communication_id}/{уникальный индентификатор ссылки на записанный разговор} voice_mail_records array Unique identifier of the link to the left voice message. You can listen by calling a request in the browser: https://app.callgear.com/system/media/voice_mail/{communication_id}/{уникальный индентификатор ссылки на голосовое сообщение}/ virtual_phone_number string yes yes yes Virtual number ua_client_id string Unique identifier in Universal Analytics ym_client_id string Unique Yandex.Metrica user identifier sale_date iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss yes yes Trade date sale_cost number yes yes Transaction amount is_transfer boolean true , false yes yes Was there a transfer during the call session search_query string yes Search query search_engine string yes Search engine name referrer_domain string yes Referrer domain referrer string yes Transition source entrance_page string yes Login page gclid string yes Google Click Identifier yclid string yes Yandex Click Identifier ymclid string Yandex Market Click Identifier ef_id string yes Used to mark up links in the AdLense system channel enum display paid affiliate messenger social email organic internal recommendation cashed referral direct yes Channel. Added tags tags array yes Tags, see method "get.tags" tag_name string Tag name tag_id number Unique tag identifier tag_change_time iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Tag insertion time tag_type enum auto , manual Tag type tag_user_id number Unique identifier of the user who added the tag tag_user_login string Login of the user who added the tag tag_employee_id number Unique identifier of the employee who added the tag tag_employee_full_name string Full name of the employee who added the tag Employees who participated in the call employees array yes Employees who participated in the call employee_id number Unique employee identifier employee_full_name string F.I.O. employee is_answered boolean Indicator whether the employee picked up the phone or not is_talked boolean Indicator whether the employee participated in the conversation or not Last employee to respond last_answered_employee_id number yes Unique identifier of the last employee who answered the phone last_answered_employee_full_name string yes Full name of the last employee who answered the phone last_answered_employee_rating number yes Rating of the last employee who spoke, which the subscriber yes F.I.O. the first employee who answered the phone first Last employee spoken Last employee who spoke last_talked_employee_id number yes Unique identifier of the last employee who spoke last_talked_employee_full_name string yes Full name of the last employee who spoke First employee to talk first_talked_employee_id number yes Unique identifier of the first employee who spoke yes Name of the scenario according to which the call processing began scenario_id number yes yes Unique identifier of the scenario for which call processing began Website site_domain_name string yes docs.text: Name Type Valid values Filtering Sorting Default response Description id number yes yes Unique chat identifier. All chat messages can be received using the "get.chat_messages_report" method status enum new - the chat does not have an employee (not hired) and there is no reason to end the chat; active - the employee accepted the chat and did not end it (there is no reason to end the chat); lost - there is a reason for ending the chat and no employee took the chat to work OR - the reason for ending the chat is visitor_disconnected (the visitor left) OR - the reason for ending the chat is closed_by_timeout (ended by timeout) or closed_by_operator (closed by the operator) AND the number of operator messages = 0; succeed - any private chat with two-way correspondence; refused - any private chat where there are messages from the operator or auto-invitation, but there are 0 messages from the visitor; yes yes yes Chat status initiator enum operator - Operator; visitor - Visitor; autoinvite - Auto-invitation; chat_channel - Messenger; chatbot - Chat bot yes yes yes Chat initiator date_time iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss yes yes Date and time of chat start duration string yes yes yes Chat duration. Value in seconds answer_time number yes yes yes Operator response time. Value in seconds communication_number number yes yes Case number. docs.text: Getting the user's global calendars > Retrieving a user's global calendars Method getobj.report_global_calendar Description Retrieving a user's global calendars Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Title Type Required Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" id number no Global calendar unique identifier Response parameters Name Type Valid values Default response Description id number yes Unique identifier of the global calendar user_id number yes Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the ["get.customer_users"](../Partners.md#get_customer_user) method params object yes Global calendar options JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"getobj.report_global_calendar", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "user_id":"number", "id": "number" } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": { "id": "number", "user_id": "number", "params": { } } } } JSON Example response```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": { "id": 1, "user_id": 2870778, "params": { "date_from": "2023-04-05 00:00:00", "date_till": "2023-04-07 23:59:59", "compared_date_from": "2023-04-02 00:00:00", "compared_date_till": "2023-04-04 23:59:59" } } } } ``` List of returned errors Look at the section "List of errors for methods with the verb getobj"

docs.text: Getting nesting of goals > Getting goal nesting Method getobj.goals_tree Description Getting goal nesting Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Title Type Required Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" Response parameters Name Type Valid values Default response Description Target groups goals_groups array yes List of target groups id number Target group ID name string Target group name parent_group_id number Identifier of the goal group in the attachment of which this goal group is located sort number End-to-end identifier used for sorting in the target tree. Goals goals array yes List of goals available to the user in the report id string Goal mnemonic name string Target name group_id number Identifier of the goal group in whose attachment this goal is located sort number End-to-end identifier used for sorting in the dimension tree. JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"getobj.goals_tree", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number" } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": { "goals_groups": [ { "id": "number", "name": "string", "parent_group_id": "number", "sort": "number" } ], "goals": [ { "id": "string", "name": "string", "group_id": "number", "sort": "number" } ] } } } JSON Example response```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "data": { "goals": [ { "id": 6104, "name": ";", "sort": 1, "group_id": "track_event" }, { "id": 11710, "name": "05", "sort": 2, "group_id": "time_on_page" }, { "id": 11747, "name": "10 Скачал \"Книга по коллтрекингу\"", "sort": 3, "group_id": "time_on_page" }, { "id": 11748, "name": "11 Страница ИМ - отправка заявки", "sort": 4, "group_id": "time_on_page" }, { "id": 11749, "name": "12 Страница ОК - отправка заявки", "sort": 5, "group_id": "comagic" }, { "id": 11750, "name": "13 CallGear - все события", "sort": 6, "group_id": "comagic" } ], "goals_groups": [ { "id": "track_event", "name": "Пользовательская", "sort": 1, "parent_group_id": null }, { "id": "time_on_page", "name": "Время на странице", "sort": 2, "parent_group_id": null }, { "id": "comagic", "name": "Сервисы", "sort": 3, "parent_group_id": null } ] }, "metadata": { "version": null, "limits": {} } } } ``` List of returned errors Look at the section "List of errors for methods with the verb getobj"

docs.text: Reports > Getting table data in a user report Method getobj.report_table Description Retrieving table data in a user report Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" limit number yes You cannot request more than 200 lines. Number of records to return. Default 50 . offset number yes Shift - determines from which record number to return limit records. Default 0 . report_type enum yes call_summary_uis summary_analytics User report type. Currently only works for report type call_summary_uis и summary_analytics . To get a list of user reports, you must use the "get.reports_list" method date_from iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Start date of main sample (limit 366 days) date_till iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss End date of the main sample dimensions array yes List of dimension mnemonics, separated by comma. For an available list of dimensions, see "Getting dimension nesting" . The order affects the construction of the tree. columns array yes List of custom column identifiers, separated by comma. For a list of available columns, see "Getting Column Nesting" . The order affects the answer. Filters used in the report filter object no It is permissible to use no more than 2 уровней nesting. See examples below Filters applied in the report. The construction logic is similar to "Filtering criteria" filters array yes An expression can contain both simple filters and a filter tree. field string The field of the entity to which filtering will be applied (the list is predefined for the method operator enum Filtering operator. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section "Filtering operators" value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. Filters applied to columns columns_filter object no It is permissible to use no more than 2 уровней nesting. See examples below Filters applied to columns. The construction logic is similar to "Filtering criteria" filters array yes An expression can contain both simple filters and a filter tree. field string The field of the entity to which filtering will be applied (the list is predefined for the method operator enum Filtering operator. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section "Filtering operators" value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. Sorting used in the report sort array no The sorting used in the report. The logic of construction is similar to "Sorting data" Row expansion parent_dimensions_value_ids array no ["N","M"] Select a report line for further expansion. Consists of a sequential list of dimension row identifiers. If not specified, level 1 is returned. Response parameters Name Type Valid values Filtering Sorting Default response Description date_from iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss yes yes Start date of the main sample date_till iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss yes yes End date of the main sample Array of strings of the requested report rows array yes Массив строк запрашиваемого отчета List of requested dimensions dimension array yes List of values requested by dimensions value string yes yes If there is no data in the requested dimension , Не определено is returned Name of values requested dimensions value_id string Unique identifier of the value branch of the requested dimensions List of requested columns columns array yes yes List of values of the requested columns in the dimension context expandable boolean Is it possible to expand a dimension JSON request structure```json { "id": "number", "jsonrpc": "2.0", "method": "getobj.report_table", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "limit": "number", "offset": "number", "report_type": "enum", "date_from": "iso8601", "date_till": "iso8601", "dimensions": [ "dimension1", "dimensionN" ], "columns": [ "column1", "columnN" ], "parent_dimensions_value_ids": [ "N", "M" ], "filter":{ }, "columns_filter":{ }, "sort": [ { "field": "string", "order": "string" } ] } } ### JSON example request structure```json { "id": "number", "jsonrpc": "2.0", "method": "getobj.report_table", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "limit": "number", "offset": "number", "report_type": "call_summary_uis", "date_from": "2020-02-01 00:00:00", "date_till": "2020-02-01 23:59:59", "dimensions": [ "site", "gr" ], "columns": [ "cc_5" ], "filter":{ "filters":[ { "filters":[ { "field":"tags", "operator":"=", "value":"Целевой" }, { "field":"tags", "operator":"=", "value":"Лид" } ], "condition":"or" }, { "filters":[ { "field":"site_domain", "operator":"=", "value":"www.site1.ru" }, { "field":"site_domain", "operator":"=", "value":"www.site1.ru" } ], "condition":"or" } ], "condition":"and" }, "columns_filter":{ "field":"cc_5", "value":1, "operator":">" } } } JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "data": { "date_from": "iso8601", "date_till": "iso8601", "rows": [ { "dimension": { "value": "string", "value_id": "string" }, "columns": [ "float" ], "expandable": "boolean" } ] } } } ### JSON Example response```JSON { "id": "1", "jsonrpc": "2.0", "result": { "data": { "date_from": "2020-02-19 00:00:00", "date_till": "2020-02-20 23:59:59", "rows": [ { "columns": [ 16.0, 25.0, 43.75 ], "dimension": { "value": "Google Chrome", "value_id": "6" }, "expandable": false }, { "columns": [ 11.0, 11.0, 36.36363636 ], "dimension": { "value": "Яндекс.Браузер", "value_id": "70" }, "expandable": true } ] } } } JSON Examples of filter nesting Minimum nesting level```JSON { "filter":{ "field":"tags", "operator":"=", "value":"Целевой" } } #### Maximum nesting level (Nesting level = 2)```JSON { "filter":{ "filters":[ { "filters":[ { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"or" }, { "filters":[ { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"or" } ], "condition":"and" } } List of returned errors Look at the section "List of errors for methods with the verb getobj"

docs.text: Getting table data in a user report > Getting table data in a user report Method getobj.benchmarking_table Description Getting table data in a user report Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" limit number yes You cannot request more than 200 lines. Number of records to return. Default 50 . offset number yes Shift - determines from which record number to return limit records. Default 0 . report_type enum yes User report type. To get a list of user reports, you must use the "get.reports_list" method date_from iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Start date of main sample (limit 366 days) date_till iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss End date of the main sample perspective_window number depends on parameters You can set a period from 1 to 180 days from session to request The number of days from the session to the request in which the session request is attributed. Is required for `report_type` = `ad_analytics` dimensions array yes Do not specify if custom_dimension_groups is passed List of dimension mnemonics, separated by comma. For an available list of dimensions, see "Getting dimension nesting" . The order affects the construction of the tree. custom_dimension_groups array yes Do not specify if dimensions is passed Groups of conditions used in the custom dimension are checked. The structure and requirements are similar to groups "Creating a custom dimension" . columns array yes List of custom column identifiers, separated by comma. For the available list of columns, see "Getting Column Nesting" . The order affects the answer. Filters used in the report filter object no It is permissible to use no more than 2 уровней nesting. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section "Filtering operators" value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. Filters applied to columns filters array yes An expression can contain both simple filters and a filter tree. field string The field of the entity to which filtering will be applied (the list is predefined for the method operator enum Filtering operator. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section "Filtering operators" value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. Sorting used in the report sort array no The sorting used in the report. The construction logic is similar to "Data sorting" Row expansion parent_dimensions_value_ids array no ["N","M"] Select a report line for further expansion. Consists of a sequential list of dimension row identifiers. If not specified, level 1 is returned. docs.text: Create a custom column based on a formula > Create a custom column based on a formula Method create.custom_formula_column Description Create a custom column based on a formula Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the ["get.customer_users"](../Partners.md#get_customer_user) method report_type enum yes ad_analytics deals_analytics chats User report type. To obtain a list of user reports, you must use the ["get.reports_list"](../get_reports_list) method name string yes Column name description string no Column description data_type enum yes integer , float , currency , percentage , time Data format Calculated column formula formula array yes Formula for calculating a column. Order is important element_type enum yes column - Column identifier, only columns with type=metric can be passed. The list of columns can be obtained using the method "getobj.columns_tree" constant - numeric value, floating point format operator - arithmetic operations for the calculated expression. Can take values = + , - , \* , / priority - priority of the calculated expression. Can take values = ( , ) Type of elements that will be used in the formula value string yes If element_type = column - it is possible to pass only column identifiers with type = metric . The list of columns can be obtained using the method "getobj.columns_tree" If element_type = constant - then you can only pass a floating point number number or an integer. Can be either positive or negative If element_type = operator - you can specify only arithmetic operations for the calculated expression. Can take values + , - , \* , / If element_type = priority - you can specify the values value = ( , ) Column ID, value, arithmetic operation, priority that will participate in the formula Formula requirements + Arithmetic sum operation. You cannot put the first and last element in formula - Arithmetic subtraction operation. You cannot put the first and last element in formula \* Arithmetic multiplication operation. You cannot put the first and last element in formula / Arithmetic division operation. You cannot put the first and last element in formula ( , ) Symbols for prioritizing the execution of operations in formula . You cannot start a formula with ) and you cannot use ( at the end You cannot use element_type : operator more than 1 time in a row. Those. you cannot make combinations like // or \*\* or -/ You cannot use element_type : constant or column with element_type : priority in a row without specifying an arithmetic operation. Those. you cannot make combinations like 11( or сс_1( or )сс_1 You cannot use element_type : constant more than 1 time in a row. Quantity of element_type : priority , value : ( in formula should be equal to element_type : priority , value : ) ### JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "create.custom_formula_column", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "report_type": "enum", "name": "string", "description": "string", "data_type": "enum", "formula": [ { "element_type":"enum", "value": "string" } ] } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "result": { "id":"number" } } ### JSON Example request #### Create a column using the formula (col_1 + 15.3) / col_3```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "create.custom_formula_column", "params": { "access_token": "2fRN4g217ef938dbf1e336d0..................................", "report_type": "ad_analytics", "name": "Звонки + Чаты", "description": "Создан вычисляемый столбец для примера", "data_type": "float", "formula": [ { "element_type":"priority", "value": "(" }, { "element_type":"column", "value": "col_1" }, { "element_type":"operator", "value": "+" }, { "element_type": "constant", "value": 15.3 }, { "element_type":"priority", "value": ")" }, { "element_type":"operator", "value": "/" }, { "element_type":"column", "value": "col_3" } ] } } ``` ### List of returned errors See the section ["List of errors for methods with the create verb"](../index.md#_changeErrors)

The list of columns can be obtained using the method "getobj.columns_tree" If element_type = constant - then you can only pass a floating point number number or an integer. Can be either positive or negative If element_type = operator - you can specify only arithmetic operations for the calculated expression. Can take values + , - , \* , / If element_type = priority - you can specify the values value = ( , ) Column ID, value, arithmetic operation, priority that will participate in the formula
docs.title: Request parameters

docs.text: + Arithmetic sum operation. You cannot put the first and last element in formula - Arithmetic subtraction operation. You cannot put the first and last element in formula \* Arithmetic multiplication operation. You cannot put the first and last element in formula / Arithmetic division operation. You cannot put the first and last element in formula ( , ) Symbols for prioritizing the execution of operations in formula . You cannot start a formula with ) and you cannot use ( at the end You cannot use element_type : operator more than 1 time in a row. Those. you cannot make combinations like // or \*\* or -/ You cannot use element_type : constant or column with element_type : priority in a row without specifying an arithmetic operation. Those. you cannot make combinations like 11( or сс_1( or )сс_1 You cannot use element_type : constant more than 1 time in a row. Quantity of element_type : priority , value : ( in formula should be equal to element_type : priority , value : ) ### JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "create.custom_formula_column", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "report_type": "enum", "name": "string", "description": "string", "data_type": "enum", "formula": [ { "element_type":"enum", "value": "string" } ] } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "result": { "id":"number" } } ### JSON Example request #### Create a column using the formula (col_1 + 15.3) / col_3```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "create.custom_formula_column", "params": { "access_token": "2fRN4g217ef938dbf1e336d0..................................", "report_type": "ad_analytics", "name": "Звонки + Чаты", "description": "Создан вычисляемый столбец для примера", "data_type": "float", "formula": [ { "element_type":"priority", "value": "(" }, { "element_type":"column", "value": "col_1" }, { "element_type":"operator", "value": "+" }, { "element_type": "constant", "value": 15.3 }, { "element_type":"priority", "value": ")" }, { "element_type":"operator", "value": "/" }, { "element_type":"column", "value": "col_3" } ] } } ``` ### List of returned errors See the section ["List of errors for methods with the create verb"](../index.md#_changeErrors)
docs.title: Formula requirements

docs.text: Create a custom column based on a metric > Create a custom column based on a metric Method create.custom_metric_column Description Create a custom column based on a metric Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the ["get.customer_users"](../Partners.md#get_customer_user) method report_type enum yes ad_analytics deals_analytics chats User report type. To obtain a list of user reports, you must use the ["get.reports_list"](../get_reports_list) method name string yes Column name description string no Column description Parameters and conditions of the metric used metric object no Metric used in the column. id enum yes Unique metric mnemonic. To get a list of metrics you must use the ["get.metrics"](../get_metrics) method aggregate enum yes The aggregate used for the metric. To obtain a list of available aggregates, you must use the ["get.metrics"](../get_metrics) method has_percentage boolean no Whether the share calculation is used. If not specified, false will be substituted multichannel_model enum no The multichannel analysis method used. To get a list of multichannel analysis methods, you must use the ["get.metrics"](../get_metrics) method Filtering conditions imposed on the metric. filter object no It is permissible to use no more than 2 уровней nesting. See examples below Filtering conditions imposed on the metric. To get a list of available filtering conditions, see section ["Getting a list of available filtering conditions for a metric"](../get_metric_filters) filters array yes An expression that can contain both simple filters and a filter tree field string The field of the entity to which filtering will be applied (the list is predefined for the method operator enum Filtering operator. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section ["Filtering Operators"](../index.md#_filterOperators) value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "create.custom_metric_column", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "report_type": "enum", "name": "string", "description": "string", "metric": { "id": "enum", "aggregate": "enum", "has_percentage": "boolean", "multichannel_model": "enum", "filter": { "filters":[ { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"enum" } } } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "result": { "id":"number" } } JSON Example request Creating a column with a condition (utm_source = yandex OR utm_source = google) AND utm_medium = google```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "create.custom_metric_column", "params": { "access_token": "2fRN4g217ef938dbf1e336d0..................................", "report_type": "ad_analytics", "name": "Звонки, количество", "description": "Создан столбец для примера", "metric": { "id": "calls", "aggregate": "count", "has_percentage": "boolean", "multichannel_model": "assisted_conversions", "filter": { "filters":[ { "filters":[ { "field":"utm_source", "operator":"=", "value":"yandex" }, { "field":"utm_source", "operator":"=", "value":"google" } ], "condition":"or" }, { "field":"utm_medium", "operator":"=", "value":"google" } ], "condition":"and" } } } } ### JSON Examples of filter nesting #### Minimum nesting level```JSON { "filter":{ "field":"tags", "operator":"=", "value":"Целевой" } } Maximum nesting level (Nesting level = 2)```JSON { "filter":{ "filters":[ { "filters":[ { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"or" }, { "filters":[ { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"or" } ], "condition":"and" } } ``` List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the create verb"

docs.text: Getting a list of metrics > Getting a list of metrics Method get.metrics Description Getting a list of metrics Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Title Type Required Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" report_type enum yes User report type. To obtain a list of user reports, you must use the method "get.reports_list" Response parameters Name Type Valid values Default response Description id enum yes Unique metric mnemonic name string yes Metric name data_type enum yes Data format List of aggregates available for the metric aggregates array yes List of aggregates available for the selected metric id enum Unique unit mnemonic name string Unit name has_percentage boolean Is it possible to calculate the share is_default boolean Default unit List of multichannel analysis methods available for metrics multichannel_models object yes List of multichannel analysis methods available for metrics. Methods of multichannel analysis models array yes Methods of multichannel analysis. id enum Unique mnemonic of multi-channel analysis name string Name of multichannel analysis description string Description of multichannel analysis is_default boolean Multichannel analysis by default group_id string Multi-channel analysis group sort number End-to-end identifier used for sorting in the tree. Multichannel analysis groups models_groups array yes List of multichannel analysis groups id string Mnemonics of the multi-channel analysis group name string Multichannel analysis group name description string Description of the multichannel analysis group. parent_group_id number Identifier of the group in whose attachment this multichannel analysis group is located sort number End-to-end identifier used for sorting. List of possible units Mnemonics Name Is share calculation used Description count Quantity Yes distinctcount Number of unique ones Yes sum Amount Yes avg Average median Median min Minimum max Maximum JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"get.metrics", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "user_id":"number", "report_type": "enum" } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": [ { "id": "enum", "name": "string", "data_type": "enum", "aggregates": [ { "id": "enum", "name": "string", "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": [ { "id": "visit_depth", "name": "Глубина просмотра", "data_type": "float", "aggregates": [ { "id": "median", "name": "медиана", "is_default": false, "has_percentage": false }, { "id": "amount", "name": "количество", "is_default": false, "has_percentage": true }, { "id": "min", "name": "минимум", "is_default": false, "has_percentage": false }, { "id": "max", "name": "максимум", "is_default": false, "has_percentage": false }, { "id": "avg", "name": "среднее", "is_default": true, "has_percentage": false } ], "multichannel_models": { "models": null, "models_groups": null } }, { "id": "chats", "name": "Чаты", "data_type": "integer", "aggregates": [ { "id": "count", "name": "количество", "is_default": true, "has_percentage": true } ], "multichannel_models": { "models": [ { "id": "assisted_conversions", "name": "Ассоциированные взаимодействия", "sort": 10, "group_id": null, "is_default": false, "description": "Ассоциированные взаимодействия, которые вспомогательно принес канал." }, { "id": "total_conversions", "name": "Всего взаимодействий", "sort": 20, "group_id": null, "is_default": false, "description": "Сумма уникальных взаимодействий который принес канал как напрямую так и ассоциированно." }, { "id": "last_click", "name": "Последнее взаимодействие", "sort": 101, "group_id": "attribution_models", "is_default": true, "description": "При использовании этой модели для каждого взаимодействия определяется последний источник перехода, без учета истории посещений посетителя." }, { "id": "last_nondirect_click", "name": "Последнее непрямое взаимодействие", "sort": 102, "group_id": "attribution_models", "is_default": false, "description": "При использовании этой модели для каждого взаимодействия определяется источник предшествующий источнику прямого перехода (в рамках которого было взаимодействие)." }, { "id": "first_click", "name": "Первое взаимодействие", "sort": 103, "group_id": "attribution_models", "is_default": false, "description": "При использовании этой модели для каждого взаимодействия определяется первый источник перехода посетителя, т.е. тот источник который первым привел на сайт вашего посетителя." }, { "id": "linear", "name": "Линейная", "sort": 104, "group_id": "attribution_models", "is_default": false, "description": "При использовании этой модели каждое взаимодействие разделяется на количество посещений совершенных посетителем до данного взаимодействия, т.е. каждому посещению присваивается равная часть взаимодействия." }, { "id": "time_decay", "name": "С учётом давности взаимодействия", "sort": 105, "group_id": "attribution_models", "is_default": false, "description": "При использовании этой модели присваивается большая ценность взаимодействия тем посещениям, которые находятся ближе к моменту взаимодействия. Ценность уменьшается в два раза за каждые 7 дней до взаимодействия. То есть, посещение которое было за 7 дней до взаимодействия, имеет в два раза меньшую ценность, чем посещение в день взаимодействия. При этом посещение которое было за 14 дней до взаимодействия, имеет в 4 раза меньшую ценность." }, { "id": "position_based_402040", "name": "С учётом привязки к позиции (40-20-40)", "sort": 106, "group_id": "attribution_models", "is_default": false, "description": "При использовании этой модели каждому первому и последнему посещению присваивается 40% взаимодействия, а оставшиеся 20% взаимодействия равномерно распределяются оставшимся посещениям." }, { "id": "position_based_206020", "name": "С учётом привязки к позиции (20-60-20)", "sort": 107, "group_id": "attribution_models", "is_default": false, "description": "При использовании этой модели каждому первому и последнему посещению присваивается 20% взаимодействия, а оставшиеся 60% взаимодействия равномерно распределяются оставшимся посещениям." }, { "id": "position_based_105040", "name": "С учетом привязки к позиции (10-50-40)", "sort": 108, "group_id": "attribution_models", "is_default": false, "description": "При использовании этой модели каждому первому посещению присваивается 10% взаимодействия, последнему посещению присваивается 40% взаимодействия, а оставшиеся 50% взаимодействия равномерно распределяются оставшимся посещениям." } ], "models_groups": [ { "id": "attribution_models", "name": "Модели атрибуции", "sort": 100, "parent_group_id": "number", "description": null } ] } } ] } } ``` List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the verb get"

При этом посещение которое было за 14 дней до взаимодействия, имеет в 4 раза меньшую ценность." }, { "id": "position_based_402040", "name": "С учётом привязки к позиции (40-20-40)", "sort": 106, "group_id": "attribution_models", "is_default": false, "description": "При использовании этой модели каждому первому и последнему посещению присваивается 40% взаимодействия, а оставшиеся 20% взаимодействия равномерно распределяются оставшимся посещениям." }, { "id": "position_based_206020", "name": "С учётом привязки к позиции (20-60-20)", "sort": 107, "group_id": "attribution_models", "is_default": false, "description": "При использовании этой модели каждому первому и последнему посещению присваивается 20% взаимодействия, а оставшиеся 60% взаимодействия равномерно распределяются оставшимся посещениям." }, { "id": "position_based_105040", "name": "С учетом привязки к позиции (10-50-40)", "sort": 108, "group_id": "attribution_models", "is_default": false, "description": "При использовании этой модели каждому первому посещению присваивается 10% взаимодействия, последнему посещению присваивается 40% взаимодействия, а оставшиеся 50% взаимодействия равномерно распределяются оставшимся посещениям." } ], "models_groups": [ { "id": "attribution_models", "name": "Модели атрибуции", "sort": 100, "parent_group_id": "number", "description": null } ] } } ] } } ```

docs.text: Get custom column customization based on a formula > Getting a custom column setting based on a formula Method getobj.custom_formula_column Description Retrieving a custom column setting based on a formula Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Title Type Required Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" id string yes Unique identifier of the custom column. To get a list of columns you must use the method "getobj.columns_tree" Response parameters Name Type Valid values Default response Description name string yes Column name description string yes Column description data_type enum float , currency , percentage yes Data format Calculated column formula formula array yes Formula for calculating a column. Order is important element_type enum yes column - Column identifier, only columns with type=metric can be passed. The list of columns can be obtained using the method "getobj.columns_tree" constant - numeric value, floating point format operator - arithmetic operations for the calculated expression. Can take values = + , - , \* , / priority - priority of the calculated expression. Can take values = ( , ) Type of elements that will be used in the formula value string yes If element_type = column - it is possible to pass only column identifiers with type = metric . The list of columns can be obtained using the method "getobj.columns_tree" If element_type = constant - then you can only pass a floating point number or an integer. Can be either positive or negative If element_type = operator - you can specify only arithmetic operations for the calculated expression. Can take values + , - , \* , / If element_type = priority - you can specify the values value = ( , ) Column ID, value, arithmetic operation, priority that will participate in the formula JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"getobj.custom_formula_column", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "user_id":"number", "id": "string" } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": { "name": "string", "description": "string", "data_type": "enum", "formula": [ { "element_type":"enum", "value": "string" } ] } } } JSON Example response Column by formula (col_1 + 15.3) / col_3```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": { "name": "Звонки + Чаты", "description": "Вычисляемый столбец для примера", "data_type": "float", "formula": [ { "element_type":"priority", "value": "(" }, { "element_type":"column", "value": "col_1" }, { "element_type":"operator", "value": "+" }, { "element_type": "constant", "value": "15.3" }, { "element_type":"priority", "value": ")" }, { "element_type":"operator", "value": "/" }, { "element_type":"column", "value": "col_3" } ] } } } ``` List of returned errors Look at the section "List of errors for methods with the verb getobj"

To get a list of custom columns you must use the ["getobj.columns_tree"](../getobj_columns_tree) method name string yes Column name description string no Column description data_type enum yes integer , float , currency , percentage , time Data format Calculated column formula formula array yes Formula for calculating a column. Order is important element_type enum yes column - Column identifier, only columns with type=metric can be passed. The list of columns can be obtained using the method "getobj.columns_tree" constant - numeric value, floating point format operator - arithmetic operations for the calculated expression. Can take values = + , - , \* , / priority - priority of the calculated expression. Can take values = ( , ) Type of elements that will be used in the formula value string yes If element_type = column - it is possible to pass only column identifiers with type = metric . The list of columns can be obtained using the method "getobj.columns_tree" If element_type = constant - then you can only pass a floating point number number or an integer. Can be either positive or negative If element_type = operator - you can specify only arithmetic operations for the calculated expression. Can take values + , - , \* , / If element_type = priority - you can specify the values value = ( , ) Column ID, value, arithmetic operation, priority that will participate in the formula Formula requirements + Arithmetic sum operation. You cannot put the first and last element in formula - Arithmetic subtraction operation. You cannot put the first and last element in formula \* Arithmetic multiplication operation. You cannot put the first and last element in formula / Arithmetic division operation. You cannot put the first and last element in formula ( , ) Symbols for prioritizing the execution of operations in formula . You cannot start a formula with ) and you cannot use ( at the end You cannot use element_type : operator more than 1 time in a row. Those. you cannot make combinations like // or \*\* or -/ You cannot use element_type : constant or column with element_type : priority in a row without specifying an arithmetic operation. Those. you cannot make combinations like 11( or сс_1( or )сс_1 You cannot use element_type : constant more than 1 time in a row. Quantity of element_type : priority , value : ( in formula should be equal to element_type : priority , value : ) ### JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "update.custom_formula_column", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "id": "string", "name": "string", "description": "string", "data_type": "enum", "formula": [ { "element_type":"enum", "value": "string" } ] } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "result": { "id":"number" } } ### List of returned errors See the section ["List of errors for methods with the update verb"](../index.md#_changeErrors)
