Those. you cannot make combinations like // or \*\* or -/ You cannot use element_type : constant or column with element_type : priority in a row without specifying an arithmetic operation. Those. you cannot make combinations like 11( or сс_1( or )сс_1 You cannot use element_type : constant more than 1 time in a row. Quantity of element_type : priority , value : ( in formula should be equal to element_type : priority , value : ) ### JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "update.custom_formula_column", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "id": "string", "name": "string", "description": "string", "data_type": "enum", "formula": [ { "element_type":"enum", "value": "string" } ] } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "result": { "id":"number" } } ### List of returned errors See the section ["List of errors for methods with the update verb"](../index.md#_changeErrors)
docs.title: Formula requirements

docs.text: Edit a custom column based on a metric > Edit a custom column based on a metric Method update.custom_metric_column Description Edit a custom column based on a metric Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the ["get.customer_users"](../Partners.md#get_customer_user) method id string yes Unique identifier of the custom column. To get a list of custom columns you must use the ["getobj.columns_tree"](../getobj_columns_tree) method name string yes Column name description string no Column description Parameters and conditions of the metric used metric object no Metric used in the column. id enum yes Unique metric mnemonic. To get a list of metrics you must use the ["get.metrics"](../get_metrics) method aggregate enum yes The aggregate used for the metric. To obtain a list of available aggregates, you must use the ["get.metrics"](../get_metrics) method has_percentage boolean no Whether the share calculation is used. If not specified, false will be substituted multichannel_model enum no The multichannel analysis method used. To get a list of multichannel analysis methods, you must use the ["get.metrics"](../get_metrics) method Filtering conditions imposed on the metric. filter object no It is permissible to use no more than 2 уровней nesting. See examples below Conditions imposed on the calculated metric. See section ["Filtering Criteria"](../index.md#_filters). To get a list of available filtering conditions, see section ["Getting a list of available filtering conditions for a metric"](../get_metric_filters) filters array yes An expression that can contain both simple filters and a filter tree field string field of the entity to which filtering will be applied (the list is predefined for the method operator enum Filtering operator. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section ["Filtering Operators"](../index.md#_filterOperators) value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "update.custom_metric_column", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "id": "string", "name": "string", "description": "string", "metric": { "id": "enum", "aggregate": "enum", "has_percentage": "boolean", "multichannel_model": "enum", "filter": { "filters":[ { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"enum" } } } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "result": { "id":"number" } } JSON Examples of filter nesting Minimum nesting level```JSON { "filter":{ "field":"tags", "operator":"=", "value":"Целевой" } } #### Maximum nesting level (Nesting level = 2)```JSON { "filter":{ "filters":[ { "filters":[ { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"or" }, { "filters":[ { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"or" } ], "condition":"and" } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the update verb"

docs.text: Getting the current state > Getting the current state Method getobj.report_state Description Getting the current report status Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Title Type Required Valid values ​​ Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" report_id number yes The user's unique report identifier. To obtain a list of user reports, you must use the method "get.reports_list" Response parameters Name Type Valid values Default response Description limit number You cannot request more than 200 lines. yes Number of records to return. Default 50 . offset number yes Shift - determines from which record number to return limit records. Default 0 . date_from iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Start date of main sample (limit 366 days) date_till iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss End date of the main sample compared_date_from iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Start date of the compared sample (limit 366 days). compared_date_till iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss End date of the compared sample. perspective_window number yes You can set a period from 1 to 180 days from session to request Number of days from the session to the request in which the session request is attributed. dimensions array List of measurements used. For an available list of dimensions, see "Getting dimension nesting" . The order affects the construction of the tree. columns array List of columns used. For a list of available custom columns, see Getting Column Nesting . Order influences report construction Filters used in the report filter object Filters applied in the report. The construction logic is similar to "Filtering criteria" filters array An expression that can contain both simple filters and a filter tree field string The field of the entity to which filtering will be applied (the list is predefined for the method operator enum Filtering operator. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section "Filtering operators" value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. Quick filters used in the report rapid_filter object Quick filters used in the report. The construction logic is similar to "Filtering criteria" filters array An expression that can contain both simple filters and a filter tree field string The field of the entity to which filtering will be applied (the list is predefined for the method operator enum Filtering operator. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section "Filtering operators" value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. The sorting used in the report. sort array The sorting used in the report. The construction logic is similar to "Data sorting" Column options column_params object no List of columns with parameters. field object yes Mnemonic or identifier of the column whose parameters have been changed widths number yes Column width. Set in px. JSON request structure```json { "id": "number", "jsonrpc": "2.0", "method": "getobj.report_state", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "report_id": "number" } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": { "limit": "number", "offset": "number", "date_from": "iso8601", "date_till": "iso8601", "compared_date_from": "iso8601", "compared_date_till": "iso8601", "perspective_window": "number", "dimensions": [ "dimension1", "dimensionN", .... ], "columns": [ "column1", "columnN", .... ], "filter": { }, "rapid_filter": { }, "sort": [ { "field": "string", "order": "string" } ], "column_params": { "field": { "widths": "number" } } } } } JSON Example response```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": { "limit": 50, "offset": 0, "compared_date_from": "2020-02-21 23:59:59", "dimensions": [ "ac" ], "date_till": "2020-02-21 23:59:59", "compared_date_till": "2020-02-21 23:59:59", "date_from": "2020-02-18 00:00:00", "perspective_window": 180, "columns": [ "col1", "col2" ], "filter":{ "filters":[ { "field":"site_domain", "operator":"=", "value":"www.site1.ru" }, { "field":"site_domain", "operator":"=", "value":"www.site1.ru" } ], "condition":"or" }, "rapid_filter":{ "filters":[ { "filters":[ { "field":"tags", "operator":"=", "value":"Целевой" }, { "field":"tags", "operator":"=", "value": "Лид" } ], "condition":"or" }, { "filters":[ { "field":"site", "operator":"=", "value": "site2.ru" }, { "field":"site", "operator":"=", "value": "site1.ru" } ], "condition":"or" } ], "condition":"and" }, "sort": [ { "field": "cf_14", "order": "asc" } ], "column_params": { "communication_type": { "widths": 200 }, "communication_id": { "widths": 150 } } } } } ``` JSON Example response List of returned errors Look at the section "List of errors for methods with the verb getobj"

docs.text: Changing the report state > State change Method set.report_state Description Change report status Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" report_id number yes User report unique identifier. To get a list of user reports, you must use the "get.reports_list" method Parameters of the transmitted report state state object yes Parameters of the transmitted report state limit number yes You cannot request more than 200 lines. Number of records to return. Default 50 . offset number yes Shift - determines from which record number to return limit records. Default 0 . date_from iso8601 yes Start date of main sample (limit 366 days) date_till iso8601 yes End date of the main sample compared_date_from iso8601 no Start date of the compared sample (limit 366 days). compared_date_till iso8601 depends on parameters End date of the compared sample. For an available list of dimensions, see "Getting dimension nesting" . The order affects the construction of the tree. Required for `report_type` = `ad_analytics` columns array yes List of columns used. For the available list of columns, see "Getting a list of columns" . Order influences report construction Filters applied in the report. filter object no It is permissible to use no more than 2 уровней nesting. See examples below Filters applied in the report. Filters applied to columns columns_filter object no It is permissible to use no more than 2 уровней nesting. See examples below Filters applied to columns. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section "Filtering operators" value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. Sorting used in the report sort array no The sorting used in the report. The construction logic is similar to "Data sorting" Column options column_params object no List of columns with parameters. field object yes Mnemonic or identifier of the column whose parameters have been changed widths number yes Column width. Set in px. "dimension1", "dimensionN" ], "columns": [ "column1", "columnN" ], "filter": { }, "rapid_filter": { }, "sort": [ { "field": "string", "order": "string" } ], "column_params": { "field": { "widths": "number", "state": { "limit": 50, "offset": 0, "compared_date_from": "2020-02-21 23:59:59", "dimensions": [ "ac" ], "date_till": "2020-02-21 23:59:59", "compared_date_till": "2020-02-21 23:59:59", "date_from": "2020-02-18 00:00:00", "perspective_window": 180, "columns": [ "col1", "col2" ], "filter":{ "filters":[ { "field":"site_domain", "operator":"=", "value":"www.site1.ru" }, { "field":"site_domain", "operator":"=", "value":"www.site1.ru" } ], "condition":"or" }, "rapid_filter":{ "filters":[ { "filters":[ { "field":"tags", "operator":"=", "value":"Целевой" }, { To get a list of reports, you must use the ["get.reports_list"](../get_reports_list) method name string no Report title description string no Report description is_favorite boolean no Is the report a favorite JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "update.report", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "id": "number", "name": "string", "description": "string", "is_favorite ": "boolean" } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "id": "number", "result": { "data": { "id": "number" } }, "jsonrpc": "2.0" } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the update verb"

docs.text: Creating a custom dimension > Create a custom dimension Method create.custom_dimension Description Create a custom dimension Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the ["get.customer_users"](../Partners.md#get_customer_user) method report_type enum yes ad_analytics deals_analytics communications deals User report type. To obtain a list of user reports, you must use the ["get.reports_list"](../get_reports_list) method name string yes Dimension name description string no Measurement description is_entity_separated boolean yes Is advanced custom nesting mode enabled Groups of conditions used in dimensions groups array yes There must be at least one group in the dimension name string yes Name of the condition group. The value assigned to data that falls under the group conditions priority number yes Must be unique within a dimension. Those. You cannot create several groups within a dimension with the same priority . priority >= 0 Order number of the condition group. Needed to understand the priority of applying groups of conditions to data. Where 0 is the highest priority. Data types and filtering applied to them, used in the custom dimension group. entities array yes Типы данных и фильтрация примененная к ним. Для получения списка доступных типов данных см. раздел ["Получение списка доступных типов данных для использования в пользовательских вложенностях"](../get_report_entities) names array yes List of data types used in custom nesting filter object no It is permissible to use no more than 3 уровней nesting. See examples below. You cannot use custom dimensions in filtering ( is_custom_dimension": true flag) Условия фильтрации используемые в группе. Для получения списка доступных условий фильтрации см. раздел ["Получение списка возможных условий фильтрации для отчета"](../get_report_filters) filters array yes An expression that can contain both simple filters and a filter tree field string The field of the entity to which filtering will be applied (the list is predefined for the method operator enum Filtering operator. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section ["Filtering Operators"](../index.md#_filterOperators) value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "create.custom_dimension", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "report_type": "enum", "name": "string", "description": "string", "is_entity_separated": "boolean", "groups": [ { "name": "string", "priority": "number", "entities": [ { "names": [ "string", "string" ], "filter": { "filters":[ { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"enum" } } ] } ] } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "result": { "id":"number" } } JSON Example request```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "create.custom_dimension", "params": { "access_token": "2fRN4g217ef938dbf1e336d0..................................", "report_type": "ad_analytics", "name": "Пользовательский источник трафика", "description": "Создано измерение для примера", "is_entity_separated": false, "groups": [ { "name": "Исходящие // СЗК", "entities": [ { "names": [ "ad_system", "visit", "communication", "lead", "deal" ], "filter": { "field": "campaign_name", "value": "исходящие", "operator": "ilike" } } ], "priority": 1 }, { "name": "Органика // Посетители без рекламных компаний", "entities": [ { "names": [ "ad_system", "visit", "communication", "lead", "deal" ], "filter": { "filters": [ { "field": "campaign_name", "value": "посетители без рекламной компании", "operator": "ilike" }, { "field": "pc", "value": "Посетители без рекламной кампании", "operator": "ilike" } ], "condition": "or" } } ], "priority": 2 } ] } } ### JSON Examples of filter nesting #### Minimum nesting level```JSON { "filter":{ "field":"tags", "operator":"=", "value":"Целевой" } } Maximum nesting level (Nesting level = 3)```JSON { "filter": { "filters":[ { "filters":[ { "filters":[ { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"or" }, { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"and" }, { docs.text: Editing a custom dimension > Editing a Custom Dimension Method update.custom_dimension Description Editing a Custom Dimension Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the ["get.customer_users"](../Partners.md#get_customer_user) method id string yes The unique identifier of the custom dimension. To get a list of dimensions, you must use the ["getobj.dimensions_tree"](../getobj_dimensions_tree) method name string yes Dimension name description string no Measurement description is_entity_separated boolean yes Is advanced custom nesting mode enabled Groups of conditions used in dimensions groups array yes name string yes Name of the condition group. The value assigned to data that falls under the group conditions priority number yes Must be unique within a dimension. Those. You cannot create several groups within a dimension with the same priority . priority >= 0 Order number of the condition group. Needed to understand the priority of applying groups of conditions to data. Where 0 is the highest priority. Data types and filtering applied to them, used in the custom dimension group. entities array yes Типы данных и фильтрация примененная к ним. Для получения списка доступных типов данных см. раздел ["Получение списка доступных типов данных для использования в пользовательских вложенностях"](../get_report_entities) names array yes List of data types used in custom nesting filter object no It is permissible to use no more than 3 уровней nesting. See examples below. You cannot use custom dimensions in filtering ( is_custom_dimension": true flag) Условия фильтрации используемые в группе. Для получения списка доступных условий фильтрации см. раздел ["Получение списка возможных условий фильтрации для отчета"](../get_report_filters) filters array yes An expression that can contain both simple filters and a filter tree field string The field of the entity to which filtering will be applied (the list is predefined for the method operator enum Filtering operator. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section ["Filtering Operators"](../index.md#_filterOperators) value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "update.custom_dimension", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "id": "string", "name": "string", "description": "string", "is_entity_separated": "boolean", "groups": [ { "name": "string", "priority": "number", "entities": [ { "names": [ "string", "string" ], "filter": { "filters":[ { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"enum" } } ] } ] } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "result": { "id":"number" } } JSON Examples of filter nesting Minimum nesting level```JSON { "filter":{ "field":"tags", "operator":"=", "value":"Целевой" } } #### Maximum nesting level (Nesting level = 3)```JSON { "filter": { "filters":[ { "filters":[ { "filters":[ { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"or" }, { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"and" }, { "filters":[ { "filters":[ { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"or" }, { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"and" } ], "condition":"or" } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the update verb"

docs.text: Get a list of custom filters > Getting a list of custom filters Method get.custom_filters Description Getting a list of custom columns Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Title Type Required Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" limit number no Number of records returned. See section "Paging" offset number no Shift - determines from which record number to return "limit" records. Default is "0". See section "Paging" filter object no See section "Filtering Criteria" fields array no See "View of Returned Data" sort array no See section "Sorting data" report_type enum yes User report type. To obtain a list of user reports, you must use the method "get.reports_list" Response parameters Name Type Valid values Filtering Sorting Default response Description id number yes yes yes User filter unique identifier name string yes Custom filter name Saved filters. filter object yes Filters saved in a custom filter. See "Filtering Criteria" filters array An expression that can contain both simple filters and a filter tree field string field of the entity to which filtering will be applied (the list is predefined for the method operator enum Filtering operator. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section ["Filtering Operators"](../index.md#_filterOperators) value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"get.custom_filters", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "user_id":"number", "offset":"number", "limit":"number", "report_type": "enum", "filter":{ }, "sort":[ { "field":"string", "order":"string" } ], "fields":[ "string" ] } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": [ { "id": "number", "name": "string", "filter":{ } } ] } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the delete verb"

docs.text: Retrieving a list of available filtering conditions for a metric > Getting a list of available filtering conditions for a metric Method get.metric_filters Description Getting a list of available filtering conditions for a metric Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Title Type Required Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" metric_id enum yes Unique metric mnemonic. To get a list of metrics available for a report, you must use the "get.metrics" report_type enum yes User report type. To obtain a list of user reports, you must use the method "get.reports_list" Response parameters Name Type Valid values Default response Description id enum yes Unique filtering condition mnemonic name string yes Filtering condition name description string yes Description of filtering condition format enum yes Filtering operators operators array yes Filtering operators available for the selected condition. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section "Possible operators" id enum Filtering operator mnemonic name string Filtering operator name is_default boolean Default filter operator List of possible values values array yes Returns either a list of possible values for the selected condition, or a list of Top 10 values from statistics for the last 7 days JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"get.metric_filters", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "user_id":"number", "metric_id": "enum" } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": [ { "id": "enum", "name": "string", "description": "string", "format": "enum", "operators": [ { "id": "enum", "name": "string", "is_default": "boolean" } ], "values": [ "value_1", "value_2", ..... ] } ] } } JSON example response```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": [ { "id": "tags", "name": "Теги", "description": "string", "format": "text_list", "operators": [ { "id": "ilike", "name": "Включает", "is_default": "true" }, { "id": "not_ilike", "name": "Исключает", "is_default": "false" }, { "id": "=", "name": "Равно", "is_default": "false" }, { "id": "!=", "name": "Не равно", "is_default": "false" } ], "values": [ "Целевой", "Лид", .... ] }, { "id": "call_type", "name": "Тип звонка", "description": "string", "format": "system", "operators": [ { "id": "=", "name": "Равно", "is_default": "false" }, { "id": "!=", "name": "Не равно", "is_default": "false" } ], "values": [ "ВАТС", "Коллтрекинг", .... ] }, .... ] } } ``` List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the verb get"

docs.text: Retrieving a list of possible rapid filtering conditions for a report > Getting a list of possible quick filter conditions for a report Method get.report_rapid_filters Description Getting a list of possible quick filter conditions for a report Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Title Type Required Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" report_type enum yes User report type. To obtain a list of user reports, you must use the method "get.reports_list" Response parameters Name Type Valid values Default response Description id enum yes Unique filtering condition mnemonic name string yes Filtering condition name description string yes Description of filtering condition format string yes Filter type additional_web_format string yes Field mnemonics for filter display logic on the web Filtering operators operators array Always one object yes Filtering operators available for the selected condition. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section "Possible operators" id enum Filtering operator mnemonic name string Filtering operator name is_default boolean Default filter operator List of possible values values array yes Returns either a list of possible values for the selected condition, or a list of Top 10 values from statistics for the last 7 days JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"get.report_rapid_filters", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "user_id":"number", "report_type": "enum" } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": [ { "id": "enum", "name": "string", "description": "string", "format": "enum", "operators": [ { "id": "enum", "name": "string", "is_default": "boolean" } ], "values": [ "value_1", "value_2", ..... ] } ] } } JSON example response```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": [ { "id": "tags", "name": "Теги", "description": "string", "format": "text_list", "operators": [ { "id": "=", "name": "Равно", "is_default": "true" } ], "values": [ "Целевой", "Лид", .... ] }, { "id": "call_type", "name": "Тип звонка", "description": "string", "format": "system", "operators": [ { "id": "=", "name": "Равно", "is_default": "true" } ], "values": [ "ВАТС", "Коллтрекинг", .... ] }, .... ] } } ``` List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the verb get"

docs.text: Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" limit number no Number of records to return. See "Paging" offset number no Shift, determines from which record number to return `"limit"` records. Default is "0". See "Paging" report_id number yes User report unique identifier. To get a list of user reports, you must use the "get.reports_list" method date_from iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Start date of main sample (31 day limit) date_till iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss End date of the main sample is_realtime boolean yes Whether the requested report is a report for the last 30 minutes. Realtime report flag. fields array no List of custom column identifiers, separated by comma. Required to obtain data. If the parameter is empty or not passed, the response will be empty. For a list of available columns, see "Getting Column Nesting" . The order affects the answer. Filters used in the report filter object no It is permissible to use no more than 2 уровней nesting. See examples below Filters applied in the report. The construction logic is similar to "Filtering criteria" filters array yes An expression can contain both simple filters and a filter tree. For an available list of filters for a report with their possible values, see section "Getting a list of possible filtering conditions for a report" . field string Field of the entity to which filtering will be applied (the list is predefined for the method) operator enum Filtering operator. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section "Filtering operators" value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. Sorting used in the report sort array no The sorting used in the report. The logic of construction is similar to "Sorting data"

docs.text: Obtaining information about call session recognition > Obtaining information about call session recognition Method getobj.call_session_recognition_info Description Obtaining information about call session recognition Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Title Type Required Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" call_session_id number yes Unique call session identifier search_text array no List of phrases to search Response parameters Name Type Valid values Default response Description Decryption information speech_phrases array yes List of call session transcripts id number Unique internal identifier of the decryption string ext_id number Unique external identifier of the decryption string speech_id number Unique identifier of the phrase phrase string Phrase text start_time iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Phrase date and time is_operator boolean Is the phrase an operator phrase. edited_phrase string Adjusted phrase Information about the decryption engine recognition_worker_type string Decryption engine Call information call_records array Unique identifier of the link to the recorded conversation. call_start_date_time iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Date and time of call contact_phone_number string The contact number from which the call was received in the case of an incoming call or the contact number to which the call was made in the case of an outgoing call. Columns JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"getobj.call_session_recognition_info", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "user_id":"number", "call_session_id": "number", "search_text": "array" } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": { "speech_phrases": [ { "id": "number", "ext_id": "number", "phrase": "string", "speech_id": "number", "start_time": "iso8601", "is_operator": "boolean", "edited_phrase": "string" } ], "recognition_worker_type": "string", "call_start_date_time": "iso8601", "contact_phone_number": "string", "call_records": "array" } } } JSON Example response```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": { "speech_phrases": [ { "id": 1858104645, "ext_id": null, "phrase": "Привет", "speech_id": 997035209, "start_time": "15:18:48", "is_operator": true, "edited_phrase": null }, { "id": 1858104600, "ext_id": null, "phrase": "Добрый день, продаете авто?", "speech_id": 997035204, "start_time": "15:18:54", "is_operator": false, "edited_phrase": null } ], "recognition_worker_type": "VoiceNavigator", "call_records": [ "https://app.callgear.com/system/media/talk/3545169699/3be7cc7f8dabe9d67dc276c98987248f/" ], "call_start_date_time": "2024-02-02 08:38:42", "contact_phone_number": "749511111113" } } } ``` List of returned errors Look at the section "List of errors for methods with the verb getobj"

docs.text: Retrieving a possible list of reports to transfer by column > Getting a possible list of reports to navigate by column Method get.column_transfer_reports_list Description Getting a possible list of reports to navigate by column Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Title Type Required Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" report_type enum yes User report type. To obtain a list of user reports, you must use the method "get.reports_list" limit number no Number of records returned. See section "Paging" offset number no Shift - determines from which record number to return "limit" records. Default is "0". See section "Paging" id string yes Mnemonic of the column through which the transition is carried out. The list of available columns for transition is determined by the is_transition parameter in the method "getobj.columns_tree" filter object no See section "Filtering Criteria" fields array no See "View of Returned Data" sort array no See section "Sorting data" Response parameters Name Type Valid values Filtering Sorting Default response Description id number yes yes yes User report unique identifier type enum communications deals yes yes yes User report type name string yes User report name description string yes User report description group_id number yes Report group ID filter_field string yes Filtering field in the destination report JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"get.column_transfer_reports_list", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "user_id":"number", "report_type": "enum", "offset":"number", "limit":"number", "id": "string", "filter":{ }, "sort":[ { "field":"string", "order":"string" } ], "fields":[ "string" ] } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": [ { "id": "number", "type": "enum", "name": "string", "description": "string", "group_id": "number", "filter_field": "string" } ] } } JSON Example response```JSON { "result": { "metadata": { "total_items": 1 }, "data": [ { "name": "Анализ рекламы", "type": "ad_analytics", "id": 2, "description": null, "group_id": 2, "filter_field": "communication_id" } ] }, "id": "1", "jsonrpc": "2.0" } ``` List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the verb get"

docs.text: Method for transferring from an aggregated report to a flat report > Method for moving from an aggregated report to a flat report Method getobj.report_transfer Description Method for moving from an aggregated report to a flat report Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" report_type enum yes User report type. To get a list of user reports, you must use the "get.reports_list" method date_from iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Start date of main sample (limit 366 days) date_till iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss End date of the main sample perspective_window number depends on parameters You can set a period from 1 to 180 days from session to request The number of days from the session to the request in which the session request is attributed. Is required for `report_type` = `ad_analytics` dimensions array yes List of dimension mnemonics, separated by comma. For an available list of dimensions, see "Getting dimension nesting" . The order affects the construction of the tree. column string yes It is necessary to specify only one column on which the click occurred for the transition. Identifier of the custom column. For the available list of columns, see "Getting Column Nesting" . Filters used in the report filter object no It is permissible to use no more than 2 уровней nesting. See examples below Filters applied in the report. The construction logic is similar to "Filtering criteria" filters array yes An expression can contain both simple filters and a filter tree. field string The field of the entity to which filtering will be applied (the list is predefined for the method operator enum Filtering operator. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section "Filtering operators" value string Value for the filtering operator. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. transfer_dimension_value_id string yes Dimension identifier for transition. In the response we return the id of the entities that were clicked on to go to the flat report. Row expansion parent_dimensions_value_ids array no ["N","M"] Select a report line for further expansion. Consists of a sequential list of dimension row identifiers. If not specified, level 1 is returned. Response parameters Name Type Valid values Filtering Sorting Default response Description transfer_ids array List of identifiers by which the transition to a flat report is carried out transfer_date_from iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss yes yes Start date of sampling when switching to a flat report transfer_date_till iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss yes yes Sampling end date when switching to a flat report JSON request structure```json { "id": "number", "jsonrpc": "2.0", "method": "getobj.report_transfer", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "report_type": "enum", "date_from": "iso8601", "date_till": "iso8601", "perspective_window": "number", "dimensions": [ "dimension1", "dimensionN" ], "column": "column1", "parent_dimensions_value_ids": [ "N", "M" ], "transfer_dimension_value_id": "string", "filter":{ } } } ### JSON example request structure```json { "id": "number", "jsonrpc": "2.0", "method": "getobj.report_transfer", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "report_type": "ad_analytics", "date_from": "2020-02-01 00:00:00", "date_till": "2020-02-01 23:59:59", "perspective_window": 180, "transfer_dimension_value_id": "23432432432", "dimensions": [ "site", "gr" ], "column": "common_column_5", "filter":{ "filters":[ { "filters":[ { "field":"tags", "operator":"=", "value":"Целевой" }, { "field":"tags", "operator":"=", "value":"Лид" } ], "condition":"or" }, { "filters":[ { "field":"site_domain", "operator":"=", "value":"www.site1.ru" }, { "field":"site_domain", "operator":"=", "value":"www.site1.ru" } ], "condition":"or" } ], "condition":"and" } } } JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "data": { "transfer_ids": [ ], "transfer_date_from": "iso8601", "transfer_date_till": "iso8601" } } } ### JSON Example response```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "data": { "transfer_ids": [23432432432], "transfer_date_from": "2020-02-01 00:00:00", "transfer_date_till": "2020-02-01 23:59:59" } } } JSON Examples of filter nesting Minimum nesting level```JSON { "filter":{ "field":"tags", "operator":"=", "value":"Целевой" } } #### Maximum nesting level (Nesting level = 2)```JSON { "filter":{ "filters":[ { "filters":[ { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"or" }, { "filters":[ { "field":"string", "operator":"enum", "value":"string" } ], "condition":"or" } ], "condition":"and" } } List of returned errors Look at the section "List of errors for methods with the verb getobj"

docs.text: Activity schedules > Creating an Activity Chart Method create.schedules Description Creating an Activity Chart Available to Partner, Client Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" name string yes Activity graph name Working schedules schedules array yes Working schedules activity_days object yes Days on which the chart is active type enum yes days_of_week days_of_month business_calendar cycle Type. days_of_week - Calendar by days of the week days_of_month - Calendar by days of the month business_calendar - Production calendar cycle - Cyclic calendar days array yes If "type" = "days_of_week" : 1 - Monday; 2 - Tuesday; 3 - environment; 4 - Thursday; 5 - Friday; 6 - Saturday 0 - Sunday; 8 - day off; 7 - worker; If "type" = "days_of_month" : numbers from 1 to 31 If "type" = "cycle" : Number of working days in a cycle; Number of non-working days in a cycle; If "type" = "business_calendar" : 8 - day off; 7 - worker; Days of the week or month Cyclic calendar example: [2,2] - the cycle will have two working days and then two non-working days. As a result, the graph turns out to be two by two. Example of a production calendar: [7] - The calendar will be active on weekdays according to the production calendar; [8] - The calendar will be active on weekends according to the production calendar Chart active time activity_time array no Chart active time. If the parameter is not specified, then the graph works without restrictions time_from string yes HH:MM Chart activity start time time_till string yes HH:MM The end time of the chart activity. Must be more than what is specified in the "time_from" parameter Chart activity period activity_date_from string no YYYY-MM-DD Chart activity start date activity_date_till string no YYYY-MM-DD Chart activity end date Response parameters Title Type Required Description id number yes Unique activity graph identifier JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"create.schedules", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "id":"number", "name":"string", "schedules":[ { "activity_days":{ "type":"enum", "days":[ ] }, "activity_time":[ { "time_from":"string", "time_till":"string" } ], "activity_date_from":"string", "activity_date_till":"string" } ] } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "result":{ "id":"number" } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the create verb"

Example of a production calendar: [7] - The calendar will be active on weekdays according to the production calendar; [8] - The calendar will be active on weekends according to the production calendar Chart active time activity_time array Chart active time. If the parameter is not specified, then the graph works without restrictions time_from string HH:MM Chart activity start time time_till string HH:MM The end time of the chart activity. Must be more than specified in the "time_from" parameter Chart activity period activity_date_from string YYYY-MM-DD Chart activity start date activity_date_till string YYYY-MM-DD Chart activity end date

docs.text:
Loading sessions > Loading sessions Parameter Meaning Necessary components for working with the method "Data API for configuration", "Loading sessions from an external system" Method weight 1 point Maximum number of sessions in one request 50 pcs Maximum JSON size 512 KB IP address of the server that needs to be given access to download files 195.211.122.249 Method upload.sessions Description Loading sessions for end-to-end analytics Available to Agent, Client Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the "get.customer_users" method ext_id string yes A unique session identifier in the external system. Duplicates are discarded when sessions are loaded into the database . To match ext_id and internal session id, use the method "get.visitor_sessions_report" site_id number yes Unique site identifier date_time iso8601 \ yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Date and time of the session. The data will be adjusted taking into account the specified time zone in your personal account. The date must not be greater than the current time and less than 2011-01-01 00:00:00 visitor_id number no Can only be from the same site_id Unique visitor identifier is_visitor_new boolean yes Is the visitor new duration number no start_time + duration must be no more than 23:59:59 date_time Session duration, value in seconds visitor_ip_address string yes Visitor IP address campaign_id number no Unique identifier of the advertising campaign. If not specified, we will try to determine the campaign using the passed parameters. If they could not determine, then the session is assigned to the advertising campaign c campaign_id = -1 Посетители без рекламной капании visitor_device enum no desktop mobile tablet other Visitor device visitor_browser_name string no For example Chrome Visitor's browser visitor_browser_version string no Visitor's browser version visitor_os_name string no Name of the visitor's operating system visitor_os_version string no Visitor operating system version visitor_screen string no For example 1440x900 Visitor monitor resolution visitor_language string no For example ru-RU Localization of the visitor's device search_engine string no Search engine search_query string no Search query ua_client_id string no Unique identifier in Universal Analytics ym_client_id string no Unique Yandex.Metrica user identifier referrer string no Transition source UTM tags utm_source string no UTM-source utm_medium string no UTM-medium utm_term string no UTM-term utm_content string no UTM-content utm_campaign string no UTM-campaign utm_referrer string no Source of transition to the site utm_expid string no Google Analytics Experiment ID Openstat tags openstat_ad string no Ad ID openstat_campaign string no Advertising campaign ID openstat_service string no Identifier of the service providing the service openstat_source string no Identifier of the site, section, page, place on the page where the corresponding advertisement was shown Other tags gclid string no Google Click Identifier yclid string no Yandex Click Identifier ymclid string no Yandex Market Click Identifier ef_id string no Used to mark up links in the AdLense contextual advertising management system tag_from string no Custom label cm_id string no A tag added to the url of ads of external advertising systems during integration. See the layout of the cm_id tag for a specific advertising system in more detail. adv_system number no 1 - Яндекс.Директ 2 - Google Ads 3 - Бегун 4 - Яндекс.Маркет 5 - Aport 6 - Facebook Ads 7 - VK Ads 8 - myTarget Ads Advertising system ID entrance_page_url string no URL of the visiting page (Login page). entrance_page_title string no Name of the visiting page. If not sent, null will be shown in the client card JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "upload.sessions", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "sessions": [ { "ext_id": "string", "site_id": "number", "date_time": "iso8601", "visitor_id": "number", "is_visitor_new": "boolean", "duration": "number", "visitor_ip_address": "string", "campaign_id": "number", "visitor_device": "enum", "visitor_browser_name": "string", "visitor_browser_version": "string", "visitor_os_name": "string", "visitor_os_version": "string", "visitor_screen": "string", "visitor_language": "string", "search_engine": "string", "search_query": "string", "ua_client_id": "string", "ym_client_id": "string", "referrer": "string", "utm_source": "string", "utm_medium": "string", "utm_term": "string", "utm_content": "string", "utm_campaign": "string", "utm_referrer": "string", "utm_expid": "string", "openstat_ad": "string", "openstat_campaign": "string", "openstat_service": "string", "openstat_source": "string", "gclid": "string", "yclid": "string", "ymclid": "string", "ef_id": "string", "tag_from": "string", "cm_id": "string", "adv_system": "number", "entrance_page_url": "string", "entrance_page_title": "string" } ] } } ### JSON response structure
The response comes as soon as the system has saved the session for further processing. The response contains ext_id of the transferred session and the session_id created on its basis in our system
```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "data": [ { "ext_id": "string", "session_id": "number" } ] } } Example for end-to-end analytics```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "test_session1", "method": "upload.sessions", "params": { "access_token": "token", "sessions": [ { "ext_id": "test2020100206", "site_id": 43525, "date_time": "2020-10-02 08:11:11", "visitor_ip_address": "62.173.141.6", "is_visitor_new": true, "campaign_id": 268176, "duration": 1 }, { "ext_id": "test2020100205", "site_id": 43525, "date_time": "2020-10-02 09:11:11", "visitor_ip_address": "62.173.141.6", "is_visitor_new": true, "campaign_id": 268176, "duration": 1 } ] } } ``` See the section "List of errors for methods with the create verb"

Starts with 7 Virtual number displayed on outgoing calls. If the virtual number is not transmitted, then the SIP line type will be only “incoming connection”; if transmitted, then it will be “incoming and outgoing” Response parameters Title Type Description phone_number string SIP line phone number password string Password for registration server string FQDN and server port for registration id number Unique SIP line identifier JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "create.sip_lines", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "employee_id": "number", "virtual_phone_number": "string" } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "phone_number": "string", "password": "string", "server": "string", "id": "number" } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the create verb"

docs.text: SIP lines > Getting a list of SIP lines Getting a list of SIP lines Method get.sip_lines Description Getting a list of SIP lines Available to Partner, Client Request parameters Title Type Required Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the client agent on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users" limit number no Number of records returned. See section "Paging" offset number no Shift determines from which record number to return "limit" records. Default is "0". See section "Paging" filter object no See section "Filtering criteria" fields array no See section "View of returned data" sort array no See section "Sorting data" Response parameters Title Type Valid values ​​ Filtering Sorting Description id number yes Unique SIP line identifier phone_number string yes SIP line phone number type enum in in_out yes yes Type of incoming communication available for the SIP line. in - Supports incoming communication only in_out - Supports incoming and outgoing communication channels_count number Number of available lines on the SIP line dial_time number 1 to 100 Default value is "60". Time to call the number in the employee's profile. Value in seconds. billing_state enum active manual_lock limit_lock yes yes SIP line status in billing. active - SIP line is active; manual_lock - SIP line is blocked manually; limit_lock - SIP line is blocked automatically. physical_state enum Registered Not registered yes yes Physical state of the SIP line. virtual_phone_number string E164 yes yes Virtual number displayed during outgoing calls If the SIP line type is "in", then this field will be empty status enum active inactive yes yes Sip number status in employee profile, see methods "get.employees" employee_id number yes yes Unique employee identifier, see methods "get.employees" employee_full_name string yes Last name First name Middle name of the employee, see methods "get.employees" IP addresses ip_addresses array yes IP addresses of registered terminals. docs.text:
Sites > Website creation for KT1 Method create.sites Description Website creation for KT1 Available to Agent, Client Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key domain_name string yes Site address on the Internet. Without specifying the protocol - "http://" or "https://". name string no Site name to display in the LC site filter, overview report and site list. default_phone_number string yes Default phone number to which calls will be forwarded. A script with the specified number is created. The name of the script corresponds to the pattern "Redirect to phone_number". default_scenario_id number no Scenario ID All calls to this number will be processed according to the logic of the selected default scenario user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the "get.customer_users" method industry_id number yes The industry to which the site belongs. 1 Cars and transport. means 2 Business and services 3 Food and drinks 4 Animals 5 Law and government 6 Internet and communications 7 Computers and electronics 8 Beauty and fitness 9 Medicine 10 Real Estate 11 Accommodation and hotels 12 Industry 13 Travel and tourism 14 Sports 15 Construction, renovation 16 Study and education 17 Finance 18 Hobbies and entertainment 19 E-commerce and shopping target_call_min_duration number no Default is "30". The minimum call time after which it is considered target. The value is specified in seconds. track_subdomains_enabled boolean no false, true Default is "true". Track site subdomains. cookie_lifetime number no The default is "90". Cookie lifetime. Time is specified in days. campaign_lifetime number no The default is "90". Lifetime of an advertising company. Time is specified in days. sales_enabled boolean no false, true Default is "false". Should sales be taken into account? second_communication_period number no 1-365 Default "1". Re-application period. Specified in days. services_enabled boolean no false, true Default is "true". Ability to deactivate the service for one specific site. In the deactivated state, only site statistics are collected; all services (call tracking, online consultant) are disabled and do not work. replacement_dynamical_block_enabled boolean no false, true Automatically select numbers in dynamically loaded blocks. (Default False) widget_link object no When the option is activated, a link will appear on the application, chat and personal data request forms, upon clicking on which the site visitor will be redirected to the specified URL. enabled boolean yes Link on widgets text string yes Link text (Maximum 100 characters) url string yes URL Show visitor ID on the site show_visitor_id object no By displaying the visitor ID on the site and finding it out from the visitor when they call, you can associate data about the visit with the call and thereby find out complete data about the callers (for example, what specific search queries are used by the visitors who call you). enabled boolean yes false, true Default "false". element_id_value string yes In order for a visitor identifier to appear on the site, you must specify the identifier (id) of the site's HTML element in this field. Where the visitor ID is placed on the site pages, you must add a container with this id (for example,
. ) message string no Sets the text that will be displayed before the visitor number on the site. length_visitor_id number no from 1 to 20 Default 6. Number of digits of the visitor ID. Response parameters Title Type Required Description id number yes unique site identifier JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "create.sites", "params": { "access_token": "string", "domain_name": "string", "name": "string", "default_phone_number": "string", "default_scenario_id": "number", "user_id": "number", "industry_id": "number", "target_call_min_duration": "number", "track_subdomains_enabled": "boolean", "cookie_lifetime": "number", "campaign_lifetime": "number", "sales_enabled": "boolean", "second_communication_period": "number", "services_enabled": "boolean", "replacement_dynamical_block_enabled" : "boolean", "widget_link" : { "enabled": "boolean", "text": "string", "url": "string" }, "show_visitor_id": { "enabled": "boolean", "element_id_value": "string", "message": "string", "length_visitor_id": "number" } } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "data": { "id": "number" }, "metadata": "object" } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the create verb"

docs.text: Sites > Getting a list of number blocks Method get.site_blocks Description Getting a list of site number blocks Available to Agent, Client Request parameters Title Type Required Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the "get.customer_users" method limit number no Number of records returned. See section "Paging" offset number no Shift determines from which record number to return "limit" records. Default is "0". See section "Paging" filter object no See section "Filtering criteria" fields array no See section "View of returned data" sort array no See section "Sorting data" Response parameters Name Type Valid values Filtering Sorting Description id number yes Unique block identifier name string yes Block name. site_id number yes yes Unique site identifier site_domain_name string yes Internet site address. Without specifying the protocol - "http://" or "https://". Template for number templates array Template of numbers in a block template_id number Unique identifier of the virtual number template. template_type enum image text Template type image - In the form of a picture; text - As text. element_attribute enum id class name selector phone_number Attribute of the replaced element on the site page id - Identifier; class - Class; name - Title; selector - Selector; phone_number - Number on the website. element_attribute_value string Name, value of the replaced element on the site page phone_number_template string If the `template_type` parameter is "text", then the field has a value. Number display template. You can specify any text in the template, as well as special tags: {country} - country code, {city} - city code, {phone} - phone number phone_number_mask string If the `template_type` parameter is "text", then the field has a value. The field specifies the {phone} display format (see parameter `phone_number_template`) Use the # symbol to indicate numbers. The length of the number can vary from 5 to 7 characters. If the automatically selected number is longer/shorter than the specified mask, all extra/missing characters will be removed from the beginning/added to the beginning. For example, the mask ##-##-## for the number 123456 will indicate that the number on the site is displayed in the format 12-34-56, the number 1234567 will be displayed as 123-45-67, and the number 12345 will be displayed as 1-23-45. Virtual numbers and advertising campaigns phone_numbers array yes If a block is configured in an advertising campaign, then it may contain a list of virtual numbers associated with the block phone_number string Virtual number phone_number_id number Unique virtual number campaign_id number A unique identifier of the advertising campaign in which the block is configured, i.e. the block is configured to automatically select a number. campaign_name string The name of the advertising campaign in which the block is configured, i.e. the block is configured to automatically select a number. image_url string Image address if parameter `template_type` = `image` JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"get.site_blocks", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "user_id":"number", "offset":"number", "limit":"number", "filter":{ }, "sort":[ { "field":"string", "order":"string" } ], "fields":[ "string" ] } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "metadata": { }, "data": [ { "id": "number", "site_id": "number", "site_domain_name": "string", "templates": [ { "template_id": "number", "template_type": "enum", "element_attribute": "enum", "element_attribute_value": "string", "phone_number_template": "string", "phone_number_mask": "string" } ], "phone_numbers": [ { "phone_number": "string", "phone_number_id": "number", "campaign_id": "number", "campaign_name": "string", "image_url": "string" } ] } ] } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the verb get"

docs.text:
Sites > Getting a list of sites Method get.sites Description Getting a list of sites Available to Agent, Client Request parameters Title Type Required Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the "get.customer_users" method limit number no Number of records returned. See section "Paging" offset number no Shift determines from which record number to return "limit" records. Default is "0". See section "Paging" filter object no See section "Filtering criteria" fields array no See section "View of returned data" sort array no See section "Sorting data" Response parameters Name Type Valid values Filtering Sorting Description id number yes Unique site identifier domain_name string yes Site address on the Internet. Without specifying the protocol - "http://" or "https://". name string yes Site name to display in the LC site filter, overview report and site list. default_phone_number string E164 format yes The default phone number to which calls received through the sitephone will be forwarded, as well as to analytics numbers used in advertising campaigns. default_scenario object The default scenario, according to which calls to numbers without active settings will be processed. Default is none. scenario_id number Unique script identifier scenario_name string yes Scenario name app_key string Client Embed Code Shared KeyThis parameter must be inserted into the template instead of the `{app_key}` parameter site_key string Embed code key for the site This parameter must be inserted into the template instead of the `{site_key}` parameter is_editable boolean Is it possible to manage the site. Edit and delete. These sites are managed from the agent's personal account creation_date iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss yes Date of site creation target_call_min_duration number yes Default is "30". The minimum call time after which it is considered target. The value is specified in seconds. track_subdomains boolean false, true yes Default is "true". Collection of statistics from all subdomains (statistics from the “www” subdomain corresponding to the main domain of the website are always collected, regardless of the flag specified). cookie_lifetime number yes The default is "90". Cookie lifetime. Time is specified in days. campaign_lifetime number yes The default is "90". Lifetime of an advertising company. Time is specified in days. sales_enabled boolean false, true yes Default is "false". Should sales be taken into account second_communication_period number 1, 3, 7, 30 yes Default "1". Re-application period. Specified in days. services_enabled boolean false, true yes Default is "true". Ability to deactivate the service for one specific site. In the deactivated state, only site statistics are collected; all services (call tracking, online consultant) are disabled and do not work. replacement_dynamical_block_enabled boolean false, true Automatically select numbers in dynamically loaded blocks. (Default False) is_support_web_directory boolean false, true yes Default is "false". Website Directory Tracking widget_link object no When the option is activated, a link will appear on the application, chat and personal data request forms, upon clicking on which the site visitor will be redirected to the specified URL. enabled boolean Link on widgets text string Link text (Maximum 100 characters) url string URL state string new, disable, error, work Site status industry_id number Unique identifier for the site's industry industry_name string Site industry name child_customer_id number yes yes Unique identifier of the agent client for whom the site is created Show visitor ID on the site show_visitor_id object Having displayed the visitor ID on the site and learned it from the visitor when calling, you will be able to associate visit data with a call and thereby find out complete data about the callers (for example, what specific search queries are used by visitors who call you). enabled boolean false, true Default is "false". We activate the display of the visitor on the site. element_id_value string In order for a visitor ID to appear on the site, you must specify the identifier (id) of the site's HTML element in this field. Where the visitor ID is placed on the site pages, you need to add a container with this id (for example
). message string Sets the text that will be displayed next to the visitor number on the site. length_visitor_id string from 1 to 20 Default is 6. Number of digits of the visitor ID. site_block_id number Unique block identifier List of site number blocks site_blocks array yes Array of identifier blocks. By default, when creating a site, one block is created. site_block_name string Block name. Connected integrations connected_integrations array yandex.direct google.adwords yandex.metrika google.analytics vk.ads mytarget.ads Integrations connected at the site level. parent_id number yes yes Unique identifier of the parent site JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"get.sites", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "user_id":"number", "offset":"number", "limit":"number", "filter":{ }, "sort":[ { "field":"string", "order":"string" } ], "fields":[ "string" ] } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "meta_data": {}, "data": [ { "id": "number", "domain_name": "string", "name": "string", "default_phone_number": "string", "default_scenario": { "scenario_id": "number", "scenario_name": "string" }, "app_key": "string", "site_key": "string", "is_editable": "boolean", "industry_id": "number", "industry_name": "string", "target_call_min_duration": "number", "track_subdomains": "boolean", "cookie_lifetime": "number", "campaign_lifetime": "number", "sales_enabled": "boolean", "second_communication_period": "number", "services_enabled": "boolean", "replacement_dynamical_block_enabled": "boolean", "widget_link": { "enabled": "boolean", "text": "string", "url": "string" }, "show_visitor_id": { "enabled": "boolean", "element_id_value": "string", "message": "string", "length_visitor_id": "number" }, "site_blocks": [ { "site_block_id": "number", "site_block_name": "string" } ], "connected_integrations": [], "is_support_web_directory": "boolean", "child_customer_id": "number", "parent_id": "number" } ] } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the verb get"

Where the visitor ID is placed on the site pages, you need to add a container with this id (for example,
. ) message string no Sets the text that will be displayed before the visitor number on the site. length_visitor_id number no from 1 to 20 Default 6. Number of digits of the visitor ID. For a list of available groups, see "get.sources_groups" state enum yes active Source active off Source disabled removed Source removed Source Source Status priority number no An end-to-end identifier used for sorting and prioritization. Optional field; if it is missing, it is considered empty. eq-tags in custom source static_parameters array no eq-tags. docs.title: Getting a list of possible filtering conditions for a source

docs.text: Title Type Required Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the method "get.customer_users"
docs.title: Request parameters

docs.text: Name Type Valid values Default response Description id enum yes Unique filtering condition mnemonic name string yes Filtering condition name description string yes Description of filtering condition format enum yes Filtering operators operators array yes Filtering operators available for the selected condition. A list of all operators can be obtained in the section "Filtering operators" id enum Filtering operator mnemonic name string Filtering operator name is_default boolean Default filter operator List of possible values values array yes Returns either a list of possible values for the selected condition, or a list of Top 10 values from statistics for the last 7 days

docs.text: Sources > Loading expenses by Source Method upload.source_costs Description Loading expenses by Source Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API Maximum number of costs in one request 500 pcs Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the "get.customer_users" method costs array yes List of expenses by Source. Maximum 500 date_from iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss The start date and time of the downloadable expense period. Currently the time is ignored. date_till iso8601 yes YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss Date and time of the end of the downloadable expense period. Cannot be less than date_from . Currently the time is ignored. source_id number yes Unique identifier of the Source. To get a list of Sources you must use the "get.sources" method site_id number no Unique site identifier. cost number yes Expenses by Source for the specified period date_from and date_till . If 0 is specified, expenses for the specified period will be deleted. JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "method": "upload.source_costs", "params": { "access_token": "string", "user_id": "number", "costs": [ { "source_id": "number", "cost": "number", "date_from": "iso8601", "date_till": "iso8601", "site_id": "number" } ] } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "success": "true" } } List of returned errors Look at the section "List of errors for methods with the verb upload"

docs.text: Getting a list of tags > Getting a list of tags Method get.tags Description Getting a list of tags Available to Agent, Client Necessary components for working with the method Data API for configuration Method weight 1 point Request parameters Name Type Required Valid values Description access_token string yes Authentication session key user_id number no Unique user identifier of the agent client on behalf of which the request is made Is required for the agent To obtain a list of client users, you must use the ["get.customer_users"](../Partners.md#get_customer_user) method limit number no Number of records to return. See section ["Paging output"](../index.md#_20) offset number no Shift, determines from which record number to return `"limit"` records. Default is "0". See section ["Paging output"](../index.md#_20) is_include_rating boolean no Whether to request a list of tags with ratings and statistics. filter object no See section ["Filtering criteria"](../index.md#_filters) fields array no See section ["View of returned data"](../index.md#_views) sort array no See section ["Data sorting"](../index.md#_sort) Response parameters Name Type Valid values Filtering Sorting Default response Description id number yes yes yes Unique tag identifier name string yes yes yes Tag name is_system boolean yes yes yes User report description rating number yes yes no Tag rating. Number of hits with this tag over the last 7 days, entered by the user. Only if is_include_rating = true is enabled is_auto boolean yes yes no Status indicating whether Auto-Tagging is enabled state string active Работает - there is at least one tag placed in the last 7 days and Auto-tagging is enabled not_active Не работает - At least one tag was not found in the last 7 days and Auto-tagging is enabled off Отключен Auto-tagging disabled yes yes no Auto-Tagging Status. Only if is_include_rating = true is enabled creation_datetime iso8601 YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss yes yes no Tag creation date color string Only HEX colors - valid format #EBEBEB yes yes no Tag color to display in reports condition object no no no Condition for placing a tag on requests JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"get.tags", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "user_id":"number", "offset":"number", "limit":"number", "is_include_rating": "boolean", "filter":{ }, "sort":[ { "field":"string", "order":"string" } ], "fields":[ "string" ] } } ### JSON response structure```JSON { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "result":{ "metadata":{ }, "data":[ { "id": "number", "name": "string", "is_system": "boolean", "rating": "number", "is_auto": "boolean", "condition": { }, "creation_datetime": "iso8601", "color": "string", "state": "string" } ] } } JSON Example response```JSON { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "k7LIWkyCE6_FTw9q7s0PM", "result": { "data": [ { "id": 62684, "name": "1", "color": "#EBEBEB", "state": "disabled", "rating": 0, "is_auto": false, "condition": null, "is_system": false, "creation_datetime": "2023-08-28 16:45:10" }, { "id": 63850, "name": "🤬1", "color": "#EBEBEB", "state": "disabled", "rating": 0, "is_auto": false, "condition": null, "is_system": false, "creation_datetime": "2023-08-28 16:45:10" } ], "metadata": { "total_items": 572, "version": null, "limits": {} } } } ```### JSON Пример запроса List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the get verb"

Valid values scenario is_active boolean yes Rule activity status JSON request structure```json { "jsonrpc":"2.0", "id":"number", "method":"set.call_processing_rule_is_active", "params":{ "access_token":"string", "user_id":"number", "id": "number", "type": "enum", "is_active": "boolean" } } ### JSON response structure```json { "jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "number", "result": { "data": {}, "metadata": {} } } List of returned errors See the section "List of errors for methods with the verb get"
